---
title: "Cluster 2 subset"
author: "Shah"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-02"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 8,
  fig.height = 6
)
```

```{r load-packages}
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(cowplot)
library(ggplot2)
library(arrow)
library(XeniumSpatialAnalysis)
library(harmony)
library(edgeR)
library(remotes)
library(patchwork)
library(clustree)
library(Matrix)
library(hdf5r)
library(circlize)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(DESeq2)
```

```{r set-paths}
setwd("~/labs/lamantia/Shah/Xenium Files")
home <- "~/labs/lamantia/Shah/Xenium Files/LD-WT-P5_NAC 9.10.25"
save.location <- "~/labs/lamantia/Shah/Xenium Files/saveRDS"
#all_samples <- readRDS(file.path(save.location, "no_22q_all_samples_with_clean_replicate_metadata_SCT_Harmony_after_findcluster_res0.1.rds"))
```

```{r # 1. Investigate and clean endothelial contamination from cluster 2, removes top10% with endothilial expression}


# First, define which cells are in cluster 2
cluster_2_cells <- Cells(all_samples)[all_samples$seurat_clusters == 2]

# Define common endothelial markers (adjust based on your species if needed)
endothelial_markers <- c("Pecam1", "Cldn5", "Kdr")


# Now check the expression of endothelial markers in cluster 2
cluster_2_expression <- FetchData(all_samples, 
                                 vars = endothelial_markers,
                                 cells = cluster_2_cells)

print("Endothelial marker expression in cluster 2:")
print(summary(cluster_2_expression))

# Check what percentage of cluster 2 cells express endothelial markers above threshold
threshold <- 1  # Adjust this threshold based on your data
for (marker in endothelial_markers) {
  pct_expressing <- mean(cluster_2_expression[, marker] > threshold) * 100
  print(paste("Percentage of cluster 2 cells expressing", marker, "above", threshold, ":", 
              round(pct_expressing, 2), "%"))
}

# Visualize the expression of these markers in cluster 2 vs other cells
FeaturePlot(all_samples, 
            features = endothelial_markers, 
            cells = cluster_2_cells,
            pt.size = 0.5,
            max.cutoff = 'q95') +
  ggtitle("Endothelial Marker Expression in Cluster 2 Cells")

# Also check in the context of all cells
FeaturePlot(all_samples, 
            features = endothelial_markers,
            pt.size = 0.5,
            max.cutoff = 'q95') +
  ggtitle("Endothelial Marker Expression - All Cells")

# Let's also check which clusters actually express endothelial markers
print("Checking endothelial marker expression across all clusters:")
for (marker in endothelial_markers) {
  avg_expression <- AverageExpression(all_samples, 
                                     features = marker, 
                                     group.by = "seurat_clusters")[[1]]
  print(paste("Average", marker, "expression by cluster:"))
  print(avg_expression)
}

# Option: Create a more stringent cluster 2 definition
# Remove cells from cluster 2 that express high levels of endothelial markers

# Calculate a composite endothelial score
endothelial_scores <- rowSums(cluster_2_expression)
high_endothelial_cells <- names(endothelial_scores)[endothelial_scores > quantile(endothelial_scores, 0.9)]

# Create a cleaned cluster 2 definition
all_samples$is_cluster_2_clean <- ifelse(
  all_samples$seurat_clusters == 2 & !(Cells(all_samples) %in% high_endothelial_cells),
  "Cluster_2_clean",
  "Other"
)

print(paste("Number of cells removed from cluster 2:", length(high_endothelial_cells)))
print(paste("Remaining cluster 2 cells:", sum(all_samples$is_cluster_2_clean == "Cluster_2_clean")))

# Plot the cleaned version
p_umap_clean <- DimPlot(all_samples, 
                        group.by = "is_cluster_2_clean", 
                        cols = c("Cluster_2_clean" = "#FF7F00", "Other" = "gray90"), 
                        pt.size = 0.5) +
  ggtitle("Cluster 2 (Cleaned) - Removed High Endothelial Expressing Cells")
print(p_umap_clean)
ggsave("cluster_2_cleaned_umap.pdf", p_umap_clean, width = 10, height = 8)


# Define neuronal markers to check
neuronal_markers <- c("Gad1", "Gad2", "Cux1")

# Check expression in the cleaned cluster 2
cluster_2_clean_cells <- Cells(all_samples)[all_samples$is_cluster_2_clean == "Cluster_2_clean"]

# Get expression data for neuronal markers in cleaned cluster 2
cluster_2_clean_expression <- FetchData(all_samples, 
                                       vars = neuronal_markers,
                                       cells = cluster_2_clean_cells)

print("Neuronal marker expression in cleaned Cluster 2:")
print(apply(cluster_2_clean_expression, 2, summary))

# Check what percentage of cleaned cluster 2 cells express these markers above threshold
threshold <- 1  # Use the same threshold as before
for (marker in neuronal_markers) {
  pct_expressing <- mean(cluster_2_clean_expression[, marker] > threshold) * 100
  print(paste("Percentage of cleaned Cluster 2 cells expressing", marker, "above", threshold, ":", 
              round(pct_expressing, 2), "%"))
}

# Visualize the expression in cleaned cluster 2 cells
FeaturePlot(all_samples, 
            features = neuronal_markers, 
            cells = cluster_2_clean_cells,
            pt.size = 0.5,
            order = TRUE,  # Plot positive cells on top
            max.cutoff = 'q95') +
  ggtitle("Neuronal Marker Expression in Cleaned Cluster 2 Cells")

# Also check in the context of all cells for comparison
FeaturePlot(all_samples, 
            features = neuronal_markers,
            pt.size = 0.5,
            order = TRUE,
            max.cutoff = 'q95') +
  ggtitle("Neuronal Marker Expression - All Cells")

# Check expression across all clusters for these neuronal markers
print("Checking neuronal marker expression across all clusters:")
for (marker in neuronal_markers) {
  avg_expression <- AverageExpression(all_samples, 
                                     features = marker, 
                                     group.by = "seurat_clusters")[[1]]
  print(paste("Average", marker, "expression by cluster:"))
  print(avg_expression)
}

# Create a violin plot to compare expression across clusters
VlnPlot(all_samples,
        features = neuronal_markers,
        group.by = "seurat_clusters",
        pt.size = 0,
        ncol = 1) +
  ggtitle("Neuronal Marker Expression by Cluster")

# Compare expression before and after cleaning
print("=== COMPARISON: Original vs Cleaned Cluster 2 ===")

# Get expression in original cluster 2
cluster_2_original_expression <- FetchData(all_samples, 
                                          vars = neuronal_markers,
                                          cells = cluster_2_cells)

for (marker in neuronal_markers) {
  original_mean <- mean(cluster_2_original_expression[, marker])
  cleaned_mean <- mean(cluster_2_clean_expression[, marker])
  original_pct <- mean(cluster_2_original_expression[, marker] > threshold) * 100
  cleaned_pct <- mean(cluster_2_clean_expression[, marker] > threshold) * 100
  
  print(paste(marker, ":"))
  print(paste("  Original - Mean:", round(original_mean, 3), "Pct > threshold:", round(original_pct, 1), "%"))
  print(paste("  Cleaned  - Mean:", round(cleaned_mean, 3), "Pct > threshold:", round(cleaned_pct, 1), "%"))
  print(paste("  Change    - Mean:", round(cleaned_mean - original_mean, 3), "Pct:", round(cleaned_pct - original_pct, 1), "%"))
}
  
  
  
  
  
```
  
```{r # 2. Create Cluster 2 subset object from the cleaned version}



cluster_2_clean_cells <- Cells(all_samples)[all_samples$is_cluster_2_clean == "Cluster_2_clean"]
cluster_2_clean <- subset(all_samples, cells = cluster_2_clean_cells)

# Check the subset
print(paste("Number of cells in cleaned Cluster 2:", ncol(cluster_2_clean)))
print("Genotype distribution in cleaned Cluster 2:")
print(table(cluster_2_clean$genotype))
print("Animal ID distribution in cleaned Cluster 2:")
print(table(cluster_2_clean$animal_id))

```

```{r # 3. Process Cleaned Cluster 2 with SCT, Harmony, and Clustering}
plan("multisession", workers = 12)
options(future.globals.maxSize = 150 * 1024^3)

DefaultAssay(cluster_2_clean) <- "Xenium"

# SCTransform normalization
cluster_2_clean <- SCTransform(
  cluster_2_clean,
  assay = "Xenium",
  method = "glmGamPoi",
  vars.to.regress = "nCount_Xenium",
  verbose = TRUE
)

# Remove 22q11 genes from HVGs
x22q11_genes <- c(
  "Ranbp1", "Dgcr8", "Cdc45", "Trmt2a", "Comt",
  "Tango2", "Mrpl40", "Slc25a1", "Zdhhc8",
  "Txnrd2", "Hira", "Prodh"
)

available_22q11 <- intersect(x22q11_genes, VariableFeatures(cluster_2_clean))
VariableFeatures(cluster_2_clean) <- setdiff(VariableFeatures(cluster_2_clean), available_22q11)

cat("Removed", length(available_22q11), "22q11 genes from HVGs for clustering\n")

# Dimensional reduction & integration
cluster_2_clean <- RunPCA(cluster_2_clean, npcs = 50, verbose = FALSE)
ElbowPlot(cluster_2_clean, ndims = 50)

# Calculate suggested PCs
pca_var <- cluster_2_clean[["pca"]]@stdev^2
pca_var_perc <- pca_var / sum(pca_var) * 100
suggested_pcs <- which(cumsum(pca_var_perc) >= 80)[1]
cat("Suggested PCs for Cluster 2:", suggested_pcs, "\n")

# Run Harmony integration
cluster_2_clean <- RunHarmony(
  object = cluster_2_clean,
  group.by.vars = "animal_id",
  dims.use = 1:27,
  verbose = TRUE
)

# UMAP and clustering
cluster_2_clean <- RunUMAP(cluster_2_clean, reduction = "harmony", dims = 1:27)
cluster_2_clean <- FindNeighbors(cluster_2_clean, reduction = "harmony", dims = 1:27)
cluster_2_clean <- FindClusters(cluster_2_clean, resolution = 0.1)

# Save for downstream use
cluster_2_clean$genotype  <- factor(cluster_2_clean$genotype)
cluster_2_clean$animal_id <- factor(cluster_2_clean$animal_id)
saveRDS(cluster_2_clean, file.path(save.location, "Cluster2_clean_no22q11_SCT_Harmony_res0.1_processed.rds"))

cluster_2_clean <- readRDS(file.path(save.location, "Cluster2_clean_no22q11_SCT_Harmony_res0.1_processed.rds"))
# Quick check: ensure exclusion worked
any(x22q11_genes %in% rownames(Loadings(cluster_2_clean[["pca"]])))

```
  
```{r # 4. Create Visualizations for Cluster 2}
# Load the processed Cluster 2 data
#cluster_2_clean <- readRDS(file.path(save.location, "Cluster2_clean_no22q11_SCT_Harmony_res0.1_processed.rds"))

# Spatial plot showing only Cluster 2 cells
sp_cluster2 <- ImageDimPlot(
  cluster_2_clean,
  group.by = "seurat_clusters",
  axes = FALSE,
  size = 0.8
) + ggtitle("Cluster 2 Cleaned - Spatial Distribution")

ggsave("Cluster2_clean_no22q11_spatial_clusters.pdf", sp_cluster2, width = 10, height = 8)

# Quick QC check
cat("Original cells:", ncol(all_samples), "\n")
cat("Cluster 2 cleaned subset:", ncol(cluster_2_clean), "\n") 
cat("Percentage kept:", round(ncol(cluster_2_clean)/ncol(all_samples)*100, 1), "%\n")

# Verify neuronal markers
FeaturePlot(cluster_2_clean, features = c("Cux2", "Gad1"), order = TRUE)

# Reorder genotype factor levels
cluster_2_clean$genotype <- factor(cluster_2_clean$genotype, levels = c("WT", "LD", "LD_NAC", "WT_NAC"))

# Generate violin plot with neuronal markers
vln_plot_cluster2 <- VlnPlot(cluster_2_clean, 
                    features = c("Cux1", "Cux2", "Pou3f2", "Rasgrf2", "Bcl11b", "Fezf2", "Foxp2", "Gad1", "Gad2", "Gfap", "Pecam1", "Ppp1r1b"), 
                    group.by = "genotype", 
                    pt.size = 0,
                       cols = c("WT" = "#A6CEE3",        # Pastel blue
                            "LD" = "#FB9A99",         # Pastel red
                            "LD_NAC" = "#FDBF6F",     # Pastel orange
                            "WT_NAC" = "#FFFF99")) +  # Pastel yellow
  theme(legend.position = "right")
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_no22q11_violin_plot_markers.pdf", vln_plot_cluster2, width = 16, height = 12, dpi = 300)




# Define your custom color palette for genotypes
genotype_colors <- c("WT" = "#A6CEE3",        # Pastel blue
                    "LD" = "#FB9A99",         # Pastel red
                    "LD_NAC" = "#FDBF6F",     # Pastel orange
                    "WT_NAC" = "#FFFF99")     # Pastel yellow

# UMAP plots
p1_cluster2 <- DimPlot(cluster_2_clean, group.by = "animal_id", shuffle = TRUE) + ggtitle("Cluster 2 - By Animal ID")
p2_cluster2 <- DimPlot(cluster_2_clean, 
                      group.by = "genotype",
                      cols = genotype_colors,
                      pt.size = 0.5) +
  ggtitle("Cluster 2 - By Genotype")
p3_cluster2 <- DimPlot(cluster_2_clean, group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Cluster 2 - Clusters")
p1_cluster2 + p2_cluster2 + p3_cluster2

ggsave("Cluster2_clean_no22q11_umap_animal_id.pdf", p1_cluster2, width = 10, height = 8)
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_no22q11_umap_genotype.pdf", p2_cluster2, width = 10, height = 8)
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_no22q11_umap_clusters.pdf", p3_cluster2, width = 10, height = 8)

# Spatial plots
sp1_cluster2 <- ImageDimPlot(cluster_2_clean, group.by = "seurat_clusters", axes = FALSE) + 
  ggtitle("Cluster 2 - Spatial Clusters")
sp2_cluster2 <- ImageDimPlot(cluster_2_clean, group.by = "genotype", axes = FALSE) + 
  ggtitle("Cluster 2 - Spatial Genotype")
sp3_cluster2 <- ImageDimPlot(cluster_2_clean, group.by = "animal_id", axes = FALSE) + 
  ggtitle("Cluster 2 - Spatial Animal ID")

ggsave("Cluster2_clean_no22q11_spatial_animal_id.pdf", sp3_cluster2, width = 10, height = 8)
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_no22q11_spatial_genotype.pdf", sp2_cluster2, width = 10, height = 8)
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_no22q11_spatial_clusters.pdf", sp1_cluster2, width = 10, height = 8)


# Create UMAP plot showing cleaned Cluster 2 cells in the context of all samples
p_cluster2_in_context <- DimPlot(all_samples,
                                group.by = "is_cluster_2_clean",
                                cols = c("Cluster_2_clean" = "#FF7F00", "Other" = "gray90"),
                                pt.size = 0.3,
                                order = c("Cluster_2_clean")) +  # Plot Cluster_2_clean on top
  ggtitle("Cleaned Cluster 2 Cells in Full Dataset") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))

print(p_cluster2_in_context)
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_in_all_samples_umap.pdf", p_cluster2_in_context, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

# Alternative: Show both the original cluster 2 and cleaned cluster 2 for comparison
if ("is_cluster_2" %in% colnames(all_samples@meta.data)) {
  # Create a combined column showing the progression
  all_samples$cluster_2_comparison <- case_when(
    all_samples$is_cluster_2_clean == "Cluster_2_clean" ~ "Cleaned Cluster 2",
    all_samples$is_cluster_2 == "Cluster_2" ~ "Original Cluster 2 (removed)",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )
  
  p_comparison <- DimPlot(all_samples,
                         group.by = "cluster_2_comparison",
                         cols = c("Cleaned Cluster 2" = "#FF7F00", 
                                 "Original Cluster 2 (removed)" = "#FFA500",  # Lighter orange
                                 "Other" = "gray90"),
                         pt.size = 0.3,
                         order = c("Cleaned Cluster 2", "Original Cluster 2 (removed)")) +
    ggtitle("Cluster 2: Original vs Cleaned") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))
  
  print(p_comparison)
  ggsave("Cluster2_original_vs_clean_comparison_umap.pdf", p_comparison, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
}

# Create a spatial plot showing cleaned Cluster 2 cells in the context of all samples
p_spatial_context <- ImageDimPlot(all_samples,
                                 group.by = "is_cluster_2_clean",
                                 cols = c("Cluster_2_clean" = "#FF7F00", "Other" = "lightgray"),
                                 axes = FALSE,
                                 dark.background = FALSE,
                                 size = 0.4) +
  ggtitle("Cleaned Cluster 2 Cells - Spatial Distribution in Full Dataset")

print(p_spatial_context)
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_spatial_in_context.pdf", p_spatial_context, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)

# Optional: Create individual spatial plots for each section
for (section in Images(all_samples)) {
  tryCatch({
    p_section_context <- ImageDimPlot(all_samples,
                                     fov = section,
                                     group.by = "is_cluster_2_clean",
                                     cols = c("Cluster_2_clean" = "#FF7F00", "Other" = "lightgray"),
                                     axes = FALSE,
                                     dark.background = FALSE,
                                     size = 0.5) +
      ggtitle(paste("Cleaned Cluster 2 -", section))
    
    ggsave(paste0("Cluster2_clean_", section, "_spatial_context.pdf"), 
           p_section_context, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
    print(paste("Saved spatial context plot for section:", section))
  }, error = function(e) {
    print(paste("Error with section", section, ":", e$message))
  })
}

# Print summary statistics
print("=== CLUSTER 2 CLEANING SUMMARY ===")
print(paste("Total cells in dataset:", ncol(all_samples)))
print(paste("Original cluster 2 cells:", sum(all_samples$seurat_clusters == 2)))
print(paste("Cleaned cluster 2 cells:", sum(all_samples$is_cluster_2_clean == "Cluster_2_clean")))
print(paste("Cells removed during cleaning:", sum(all_samples$seurat_clusters == 2) - sum(all_samples$is_cluster_2_clean == "Cluster_2_clean")))
print(paste("Percentage of original cluster 2 kept:", 
            round(sum(all_samples$is_cluster_2_clean == "Cluster_2_clean") / sum(all_samples$seurat_clusters == 2) * 100, 1), "%"))

# Create a multi-panel figure showing the cleaning process
library(patchwork)

# If you have the original cluster 2 highlight
if ("is_cluster_2" %in% colnames(all_samples@meta.data)) {
  p_original <- DimPlot(all_samples,
                       group.by = "is_cluster_2",
                       cols = c("Cluster_2" = "#FFA500", "Other" = "gray90"),
                       pt.size = 0.3) +
    ggtitle("Original Cluster 2") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
  
  p_cleaned <- DimPlot(all_samples,
                      group.by = "is_cluster_2_clean",
                      cols = c("Cluster_2_clean" = "#FF7F00", "Other" = "gray90"),
                      pt.size = 0.3) +
    ggtitle("Cleaned Cluster 2") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
  
  combined_plot <- p_original + p_cleaned + 
    plot_annotation(title = "Cluster 2 Cleaning Process",
                    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")))
  
  ggsave("Cluster2_cleaning_process_umap.pdf", combined_plot, width = 16, height = 8, dpi = 300)
}

```
  
```{r # 5. Create PCA and PC Loadings Plots for Cluster 2}
# Create enhanced PCA plot for Cluster 2
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)

# Get variance explained for Cluster 2 PCA
variance_explained_cluster2 <- cluster_2_clean[["pca"]]@stdev^2 / sum(cluster_2_clean[["pca"]]@stdev^2) * 100

# Create clean PCA plot for Cluster 2
p_pca_cluster2 <- DimPlot(cluster_2_clean,
                         reduction = "pca",
                         group.by = "seurat_clusters",
                         pt.size = 1.5) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1 (", round(variance_explained_cluster2[1], 1), "% variance)")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2 (", round(variance_explained_cluster2[2], 1), "% variance)")) +
  ggtitle("Cluster 2 - PCA") +
  theme_cowplot() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12))

print(p_pca_cluster2)
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_PCA.pdf", p_pca_cluster2, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Get PCA loadings for Cluster 2
pca_loadings_cluster2 <- Loadings(cluster_2_clean, reduction = "pca")[, 1:2]
top_pc1_cluster2 <- head(pca_loadings_cluster2[order(abs(pca_loadings_cluster2[,1]), decreasing = TRUE), 1], 20)
top_pc2_cluster2 <- head(pca_loadings_cluster2[order(abs(pca_loadings_cluster2[,2]), decreasing = TRUE), 2], 20)

print("Top genes in PC1 for Cluster 2:")
print(top_pc1_cluster2)

print("Top genes in PC2 for Cluster 2:")
print(top_pc2_cluster2)

# Create PCA loadings visualization for Cluster 2
pc1_genes_cluster2 <- data.frame(
  gene = names(top_pc1_cluster2)[1:10],
  loading = top_pc1_cluster2[1:10],
  pc = "PC1"
)

pc2_genes_cluster2 <- data.frame(
  gene = names(top_pc2_cluster2)[1:10],
  loading = top_pc2_cluster2[1:10],
  pc = "PC2"
)

p_loadings_cluster2 <- ggplot(rbind(pc1_genes_cluster2, pc2_genes_cluster2), 
                             aes(x = reorder(gene, abs(loading)), y = abs(loading), fill = loading > 0)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~pc, scales = "free_y") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Gene", y = "Absolute Loading Value",
       title = "Cluster 2 - Key Genes Driving Principal Components",
       subtitle = paste("PC1:", round(variance_explained_cluster2[1], 1), "% variance | PC2:", round(variance_explained_cluster2[2], 1), "% variance")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "blue", "TRUE" = "red"),
                    name = "Direction",
                    labels = c("Negative", "Positive")) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave("Cluster2_clean_PCA_loadings_analysis.pdf", p_loadings_cluster2, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```

```{r # 6. Find Subcluster Markers for Cluster 2 Cleaned Subset}
plan("multisession", workers = 12)
options(future.globals.maxSize = 150 * 1024^3)

DefaultAssay(cluster_2_clean) <- "Xenium"
cluster_2_clean <- JoinLayers(cluster_2_clean)
cluster_2_clean <- NormalizeData(cluster_2_clean, normalization.method = "LogNormalize")
cluster_2_clean <- ScaleData(cluster_2_clean)

# Find markers with slightly relaxed parameters
AllMarkers_cluster2 <- FindAllMarkers(
    cluster_2_clean,
    assay = "Xenium",
    only.pos = TRUE,
    min.pct = 0.25,
    logfc.threshold = 0.25,
    test.use = "wilcox"
)

# save for reference
write.csv(AllMarkers_cluster2, file.path(save.location, "Cluster2_clean_no22q11_Xenium_FindAllMarkers.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r # 7. DE using FindMarkers for Cluster 2 Cleaned Subset}
# Set identities to genotype for DE analysis
Idents(cluster_2_clean) <- "genotype"

# Include animal_id as latent variable to control for batch effects
de_wt_vs_ld_cluster2 <- FindMarkers(
  cluster_2_clean,
  ident.1 = "LD",
  ident.2 = "WT",
  latent.vars = "animal_id",
  min.pct = 0.1,
  logfc.threshold = 0.1
)

de_wt_vs_ldnac_cluster2 <- FindMarkers(
  cluster_2_clean,
  ident.1 = "LD_NAC",
  ident.2 = "WT",
  latent.vars = "animal_id",
  min.pct = 0.1,
  logfc.threshold = 0.1
)

de_ld_vs_ldnac_cluster2 <- FindMarkers(
  cluster_2_clean,
  ident.1 = "LD_NAC",
  ident.2 = "LD",
  latent.vars = "animal_id",
  min.pct = 0.1,
  logfc.threshold = 0.1
)

de_wt_vs_wtnac_cluster2 <- FindMarkers(
  cluster_2_clean,
  ident.1 = "WT_NAC",
  ident.2 = "WT",
  latent.vars = "animal_id",
  min.pct = 0.1,
  logfc.threshold = 0.1
)

de_wtnac_vs_ldnac_cluster2 <- FindMarkers(
  cluster_2_clean,
  ident.1 = "LD_NAC",
  ident.2 = "WT_NAC",
  latent.vars = "animal_id",
  min.pct = 0.1,
  logfc.threshold = 0.1
)

# Save all DE results
write.csv(de_wt_vs_ld_cluster2, "Cluster2_clean_WT_vs_LD_DE_Findmarkers.csv")
write.csv(de_wt_vs_ldnac_cluster2, "Cluster2_clean_WT_vs_LDNAC_DE_Findmarkers.csv")
write.csv(de_ld_vs_ldnac_cluster2, "Cluster2_clean_LD_vs_LDNAC_DE_Findmarkers.csv")
write.csv(de_wt_vs_wtnac_cluster2, "Cluster2_clean_WT_vs_WTNAC_DE_Findmarkers.csv")
write.csv(de_wtnac_vs_ldnac_cluster2, "Cluster2_clean_WTNAC_vs_LDNAC_DE_Findmarkers.csv")

```

```{r # 8. Volcano Plots for Cluster 2 Cleaned DE Analysis}

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggrepel)

# Define the create_volcano function for Cluster 2
create_volcano <- function(de_results, title, p_cutoff = 0.05, fc_cutoff = 0.25) {
  # Prepare data
  volcano_data <- de_results %>%
    mutate(
      gene = rownames(.),
      log10_pval = -log10(p_val_adj),
      significance = case_when(
        p_val_adj < p_cutoff & avg_log2FC > fc_cutoff ~ "Up",
        p_val_adj < p_cutoff & avg_log2FC < -fc_cutoff ~ "Down", 
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      )
    )
  
  # Get top genes for labeling
  top_genes <- volcano_data %>%
    filter(significance != "Not significant") %>%
    arrange(p_val_adj) %>%
    head(10)
  
  # Create plot
  p <- ggplot(volcano_data, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = log10_pval, color = significance)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_cutoff), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-fc_cutoff, fc_cutoff), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    geom_text_repel(
      data = top_genes,
      aes(label = gene),
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = 20,
      box.padding = 0.5,
      segment.color = "gray50"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Up" = "#E31A1C",
        "Down" = "#1F78B4", 
        "Not significant" = "gray70"
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = "Log2 Fold Change",
      y = "-Log10 Adjusted P-value"
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank()
    )
  
  return(p)
}

# Create and save each volcano plot for Cluster 2
p1_cluster2 <- create_volcano(de_wt_vs_ld_cluster2, "LD vs WT in Cluster 2")
p2_cluster2 <- create_volcano(de_wt_vs_ldnac_cluster2, "LD_NAC vs WT in Cluster 2")
p3_cluster2 <- create_volcano(de_ld_vs_ldnac_cluster2, "LD_NAC vs LD in Cluster 2")
p4_cluster2 <- create_volcano(de_wt_vs_wtnac_cluster2, "WT_NAC vs WT in Cluster 2")
p5_cluster2 <- create_volcano(de_wtnac_vs_ldnac_cluster2, "LD_NAC vs WT_NAC in Cluster 2")

# Save individual plots
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_volcano_LD_vs_WT_FindMarkers.pdf", p1_cluster2, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_volcano_LDNAC_vs_WT_FindMarkers.pdf", p2_cluster2, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_volcano_LDNAC_vs_LD_FindMarkers.pdf", p3_cluster2, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_volcano_WTNAC_vs_WT_FindMarkers.pdf", p4_cluster2, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_volcano_LDNAC_vs_WTNAC_FindMarkers.pdf", p5_cluster2, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)

# Print confirmation
print("Cluster 2 volcano plots created and saved successfully!")

```

```{r # 9. ANOVA on Individual Gene for Cluster 2 Cleaned}
gene <- "Txnrd2"  # change if needed

# make sure we're using Xenium counts
DefaultAssay(cluster_2_clean) <- "Xenium"
cluster_2_clean <- JoinLayers(cluster_2_clean)
Idents(cluster_2_clean) <- "genotype"

# check gene exists
if (!gene %in% rownames(cluster_2_clean)) stop(paste("Gene not in panel:", gene))

# pull per-cell expression + metadata
df_cluster2 <- data.frame(
  expr = as.numeric(GetAssayData(cluster_2_clean, slot = "counts")[gene, colnames(cluster_2_clean)]),
  animal_id = cluster_2_clean$animal_id,
  genotype  = cluster_2_clean$genotype
)

# per-animal means
rep_means_cluster2 <- df_cluster2 %>%
  group_by(genotype, animal_id) %>%
  summarize(mean_expr = mean(expr, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# group summary for plotting
grp_sum_cluster2 <- rep_means_cluster2 %>%
  group_by(genotype) %>%
  summarize(
    mean = mean(mean_expr),
    se   = sd(mean_expr) / sqrt(n()),
    n    = n(), .groups = "drop"
  )

# ANOVA + Tukey
fit_cluster2 <- aov(mean_expr ~ genotype, data = rep_means_cluster2)
anova_res_cluster2 <- summary(fit_cluster2)
tukey_res_cluster2 <- TukeyHSD(fit_cluster2)

print("Cluster 2 ANOVA results:")
print(anova_res_cluster2)
print("Cluster 2 Tukey results:")
print(tukey_res_cluster2)

# Plot with consistent genotype colors
ggplot(rep_means_cluster2, aes(x = genotype, y = mean_expr)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.12, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = grp_sum_cluster2,
    aes(x = genotype, y = mean, ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se),
    width = 0.2,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = grp_sum_cluster2,
    aes(x = genotype, y = mean),
    size = 3,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = genotype_colors) +
  labs(
    title = paste(gene, "per-animal mean (Cluster 2)"),
    y = "mean counts per cell",
    x = "genotype"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

```

```{r # 10. DE Analysis with Count Aggregate in DESeq2 for Cluster 2}
pb_cluster2 <- AggregateExpression(
  cluster_2_clean,
  assays = "Xenium",
  group.by = c("genotype", "animal_id"),
  slot = "counts"
)
counts_cluster2 <- pb_cluster2$Xenium

meta_cluster2 <- data.frame(
  genotype  = sub("_.*", "", colnames(counts_cluster2)),
  animal_id = sub("^[^_]*_", "", colnames(counts_cluster2))
)
meta_cluster2$genotype  <- gsub("-", "_", meta_cluster2$genotype)
meta_cluster2$animal_id <- gsub("-", "_", meta_cluster2$animal_id)

meta_cluster2$genotype <- factor(meta_cluster2$genotype, levels = c("WT", "LD", "LD_NAC", "WT_NAC"))

dds_cluster2 <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = round(counts_cluster2),
  colData = meta_cluster2,
  design = ~ genotype
)

dds_cluster2 <- DESeq(dds_cluster2)

resultsNames(dds_cluster2)

res_LD_vs_WT_cluster2      <- results(dds_cluster2, name = "genotype_LD_vs_WT")
res_LD_NAC_vs_WT_cluster2  <- results(dds_cluster2, name = "genotype_LD_NAC_vs_WT")
res_WT_NAC_vs_WT_cluster2  <- results(dds_cluster2, name = "genotype_WT_NAC_vs_WT")

# for non-reference contrasts
res_LD_NAC_vs_LD_cluster2  <- results(dds_cluster2, contrast = c("genotype", "LD_NAC", "LD"))
res_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2 <- results(dds_cluster2, contrast = c("genotype", "WT_NAC", "LD_NAC"))

write.csv(as.data.frame(res_LD_vs_WT_cluster2),      file.path(save.location, "Cluster2_clean_DESeq2_LD_vs_WT.csv"))
write.csv(as.data.frame(res_LD_NAC_vs_WT_cluster2),  file.path(save.location, "Cluster2_clean_DESeq2_LD_NAC_vs_WT.csv"))
write.csv(as.data.frame(res_WT_NAC_vs_WT_cluster2),  file.path(save.location, "Cluster2_clean_DESeq2_WT_NAC_vs_WT.csv"))
write.csv(as.data.frame(res_LD_NAC_vs_LD_cluster2),  file.path(save.location, "Cluster2_clean_DESeq2_LD_NAC_vs_LD.csv"))
write.csv(as.data.frame(res_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2), file.path(save.location, "Cluster2_clean_DESeq2_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC.csv"))

# DESeq2 volcano plots
volcano(res_LD_vs_WT_cluster2, "res_LD_vs_WT_cluster2")
volcano(res_LD_NAC_vs_WT_cluster2, "Cluster 2: LD_NAC vs WT")
volcano(res_WT_NAC_vs_WT_cluster2, "Cluster 2: WT_NAC vs WT")

# Create and save each volcano plot for Cluster 2
p1_cluster2 <- create_volcano(de_wt_vs_ld_cluster2, "res_LD_vs_WT_cluster2")
p2_cluster2 <- create_volcano(de_wt_vs_ldnac_cluster2, "res_LD_NAC_vs_WT_cluster2")
p3_cluster2 <- create_volcano(de_ld_vs_ldnac_cluster2, "res_LD_NAC_vs_LD_cluster2")
p4_cluster2 <- create_volcano(de_wt_vs_wtnac_cluster2, "res_WT_NAC_vs_WT_cluster2")
p5_cluster2 <- create_volcano(de_wtnac_vs_ldnac_cluster2, "res_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2")

# Save individual plots
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_volcano_LD_vs_WT_DESeq2.pdf", p1_cluster2, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_volcano_LDNAC_vs_WT_DESeq2.pdf", p2_cluster2, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_volcano_LDNAC_vs_LD_DESeq2.pdf", p3_cluster2, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_volcano_WTNAC_vs_WT_DESeq2.pdf", p4_cluster2, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_volcano_LDNAC_vs_WTNAC_DESeq2.pdf", p5_cluster2, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)

# Print confirmation
print("Cluster 2 volcano plots created and saved successfully!")


```

```{r # 11. DE Analysis with Count Aggregate in Limma for Cluster 2}

pb_cluster2_limma <- AggregateExpression(
  cluster_2_clean,
  assays = "SCT",
  group.by = c("genotype", "animal_id"),
  slot = "data"
)

pb_mat_cluster2 <- pb_cluster2_limma$SCT
meta_cluster2_limma <- as.data.frame(do.call(rbind, strsplit(colnames(pb_mat_cluster2), "_")))
colnames(meta_cluster2_limma) <- c("genotype", "animal_id")

meta_cluster2_limma$genotype <- gsub("-", "_", meta_cluster2_limma$genotype)
meta_cluster2_limma$genotype <- factor(meta_cluster2_limma$genotype)

design_cluster2 <- model.matrix(~0 + genotype, data = meta_cluster2_limma)
colnames(design_cluster2) <- levels(meta_cluster2_limma$genotype)

contr_cluster2 <- makeContrasts(
  WT_vs_LD     = WT - LD,
  WT_vs_LD_NAC = WT - LD_NAC,
  LD_vs_LD_NAC = LD - LD_NAC,
  WT_vs_WT_NAC = WT - WT_NAC,
  WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC = WT_NAC - LD_NAC,
  levels = design_cluster2
)

fit_cluster2_limma <- lmFit(pb_mat_cluster2, design_cluster2)
fit2_cluster2 <- contrasts.fit(fit_cluster2_limma, contr_cluster2)
fit2_cluster2 <- eBayes(fit2_cluster2)

res_WT_vs_LD_cluster2      <- topTable(fit2_cluster2, coef = "WT_vs_LD", n = Inf)
res_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2  <- topTable(fit2_cluster2, coef = "WT_vs_LD_NAC", n = Inf)
res_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2  <- topTable(fit2_cluster2, coef = "LD_vs_LD_NAC", n = Inf)
res_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2  <- topTable(fit2_cluster2, coef = "WT_vs_WT_NAC", n = Inf)
res_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2 <- topTable(fit2_cluster2, coef = "WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC", n = Inf)

write.csv(res_WT_vs_LD_cluster2, file.path(save.location, "Cluster2_clean_limma_WT_vs_LD.csv"))
write.csv(res_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, file.path(save.location, "Cluster2_clean_limma_WT_vs_LD_NAC.csv"))
write.csv(res_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, file.path(save.location, "Cluster2_clean_limma_LD_vs_LD_NAC.csv"))
write.csv(res_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2, file.path(save.location, "Cluster2_clean_limma_WT_vs_WT_NAC.csv"))
write.csv(res_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, file.path(save.location, "Cluster2_clean_limma_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC.csv"))


# Create and save each volcano plot for Cluster 2 (limma results)
# Define a volcano function specifically for limma results
create_volcano_limma <- function(limma_results, title, p_cutoff = 0.05, fc_cutoff = 0.25) {
  # Prepare data
  volcano_data <- limma_results %>%
    mutate(
      gene = rownames(.),
      log10_pval = -log10(adj.P.Val),
      significance = case_when(
        adj.P.Val < p_cutoff & logFC > fc_cutoff ~ "Up",
        adj.P.Val < p_cutoff & logFC < -fc_cutoff ~ "Down", 
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      )
    )
  
  # Get top genes for labeling
  top_genes <- volcano_data %>%
    filter(significance != "Not significant") %>%
    arrange(adj.P.Val) %>%
    head(10)
  
  # Create plot
  p <- ggplot(volcano_data, aes(x = logFC, y = log10_pval, color = significance)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_cutoff), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-fc_cutoff, fc_cutoff), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    geom_text_repel(
      data = top_genes,
      aes(label = gene),
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = 20,
      box.padding = 0.5,
      segment.color = "gray50"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Up" = "#E31A1C",
        "Down" = "#1F78B4", 
        "Not significant" = "gray70"
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = "Log2 Fold Change",
      y = "-Log10 Adjusted P-value"
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank()
    )
  
  return(p)
}

# Create and save each volcano plot for Cluster 2 limma results
p1_cluster2_limma <- create_volcano_limma(res_WT_vs_LD_cluster2, "LD vs WT in Cluster 2 (limma)")
p2_cluster2_limma <- create_volcano_limma(res_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, "LD_NAC vs WT in Cluster 2 (limma)")
p3_cluster2_limma <- create_volcano_limma(res_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, "LD_NAC vs LD in Cluster 2 (limma)")
p4_cluster2_limma <- create_volcano_limma(res_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2, "WT_NAC vs WT in Cluster 2 (limma)")
p5_cluster2_limma <- create_volcano_limma(res_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, "LD_NAC vs WT_NAC in Cluster 2 (limma)")

# Save individual plots
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_limma_volcano_LD_vs_WT.pdf", p1_cluster2_limma, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_limma_volcano_LDNAC_vs_WT.pdf", p2_cluster2_limma, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_limma_volcano_LDNAC_vs_LD.pdf", p3_cluster2_limma, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_limma_volcano_WTNAC_vs_WT.pdf", p4_cluster2_limma, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_limma_volcano_LDNAC_vs_WTNAC.pdf", p5_cluster2_limma, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)

```

```{r # 12. DE Analysis with Count Aggregate in EdgeR for Cluster 2}
DefaultAssay(cluster_2_clean) <- "Xenium"
cluster_2_clean <- JoinLayers(cluster_2_clean)

cell_meta_cluster2 <- cluster_2_clean@meta.data[, c("genotype","animal_id")]
cell_meta_cluster2$cell <- rownames(cell_meta_cluster2)

X_cluster2 <- GetAssayData(cluster_2_clean, slot = "counts")
rep_keys_cluster2 <- paste(cell_meta_cluster2$genotype, cell_meta_cluster2$animal_id, sep = "__")

pb_mat_cluster2_edgeR <- rowsum(t(as.matrix(X_cluster2)), group = rep_keys_cluster2)
pb_mat_cluster2_edgeR <- t(pb_mat_cluster2_edgeR)

parts_cluster2 <- do.call(rbind, strsplit(colnames(pb_mat_cluster2_edgeR), "__"))
coldata_cluster2 <- data.frame(
  replicate = colnames(pb_mat_cluster2_edgeR),
  genotype  = factor(parts_cluster2[,1], levels = c("WT","LD","WT_NAC","LD_NAC")),
  animal_id = parts_cluster2[,2]
)

y_cluster2 <- DGEList(counts = pb_mat_cluster2_edgeR, samples = coldata_cluster2)
y_cluster2 <- calcNormFactors(y_cluster2, method = "TMM")

design_cluster2_edgeR <- model.matrix(~ 0 + genotype, data = y_cluster2$samples)
colnames(design_cluster2_edgeR) <- levels(coldata_cluster2$genotype)

y_cluster2 <- estimateDisp(y_cluster2, design_cluster2_edgeR)
fit_cluster2_edgeR <- glmQLFit(y_cluster2, design_cluster2_edgeR)

ct_WT_vs_LD_cluster2      <- makeContrasts(LD - WT, levels = design_cluster2_edgeR)
ct_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2  <- makeContrasts(LD_NAC - WT, levels = design_cluster2_edgeR)
ct_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2  <- makeContrasts(LD_NAC - LD, levels = design_cluster2_edgeR)
ct_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2  <- makeContrasts(WT_NAC - WT, levels = design_cluster2_edgeR)
ct_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2  <- makeContrasts(LD_NAC - WT_NAC, levels = design_cluster2_edgeR)

res_WT_vs_LD_cluster2_edgeR     <- glmQLFTest(fit_cluster2_edgeR, contrast = ct_WT_vs_LD_cluster2)
res_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2_edgeR <- glmQLFTest(fit_cluster2_edgeR, contrast = ct_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2)
res_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2_edgeR <- glmQLFTest(fit_cluster2_edgeR, contrast = ct_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2)
res_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2_edgeR <- glmQLFTest(fit_cluster2_edgeR, contrast = ct_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2)
res_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2_edgeR <- glmQLFTest(fit_cluster2_edgeR, contrast = ct_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2)

tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster2     <- topTags(res_WT_vs_LD_cluster2_edgeR, n = Inf)$table
tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2 <- topTags(res_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2_edgeR, n = Inf)$table
tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2 <- topTags(res_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2_edgeR, n = Inf)$table
tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2 <- topTags(res_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2_edgeR, n = Inf)$table
tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2 <- topTags(res_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2_edgeR, n = Inf)$table


# Define the add_gene function for EdgeR results
add_gene <- function(df) { 
  df$gene <- rownames(df); 
  df[, c("gene", colnames(df)[colnames(df)!="gene"])] 
}

# Now apply the function to all EdgeR tables
tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster2     <- add_gene(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster2)
tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2 <- add_gene(tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2)
tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2 <- add_gene(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2)
tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2 <- add_gene(tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2)
tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2 <- add_gene(tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2)

# Save the results
write.csv(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster2, file.path(save.location, "Cluster2_clean_edgeR_WT_vs_LD.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, file.path(save.location, "Cluster2_clean_edgeR_WT_vs_LD_NAC.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, file.path(save.location, "Cluster2_clean_edgeR_LD_vs_LD_NAC.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2, file.path(save.location, "Cluster2_clean_edgeR_WT_vs_WT_NAC.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, file.path(save.location, "Cluster2_clean_edgeR_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC.csv"), row.names = FALSE)


# Define volcano function for EdgeR results
volcano <- function(df, lfc = "logFC", p = "PValue", gene = "gene", fdr_cut = 0.05, lfc_cut = 0.25, title = "") {
  # Calculate p-value cutoff that matches the FDR threshold
  p_cut <- calculate_pvalue_cutoff(df, p = p, fdr = "FDR", fdr_cut = fdr_cut)
  
  df$signif <- with(df, ifelse(FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut, "sig", "ns"))
  
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[lfc]], y = -log10(.data[[p]]), color = signif)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_cut, lfc_cut), linetype = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(ns = "grey70", sig = "red3")) +
    labs(title = title, x = "log2 fold-change", y = "-log10(p)") +
    theme_classic()
  
  # Only add the horizontal line if a valid p_cut was found
  if (!is.na(p_cut) && is.finite(p_cut)) {
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_cut), linetype = 2)
  } else {
    warning("Could not calculate p-value cutoff for FDR = ", fdr_cut, 
            ". No horizontal line drawn.")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# Helper function to calculate p-value cutoff for a given FDR threshold
calculate_pvalue_cutoff <- function(df, p = "PValue", fdr = "FDR", fdr_cut = 0.05) {
  # Check if required columns exist
  if (!p %in% names(df) || !fdr %in% names(df)) {
    warning("Required columns not found in data frame")
    return(NA)
  }
  
  # Get p-values and FDR values
  pvals <- df[[p]]
  fdrs <- df[[fdr]]
  
  # Filter to significant hits at the given FDR cutoff
  sig_idx <- which(fdrs < fdr_cut)
  
  if (length(sig_idx) == 0) {
    # No significant hits, return NA
    return(NA)
  }
  
  # Find the maximum p-value among significant hits
  # This represents the p-value cutoff that would give us exactly these significant hits
  p_cut <- max(pvals[sig_idx], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  return(p_cut)
}

# Create a list of plots
plots_cluster2 <- list(
  volcano(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: WT vs LD"),
  volcano(tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: WT vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: LD vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano(tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: WT vs WT_NAC"),
  volcano(tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: WT_NAC vs LD_NAC")
)

# Save as multi-page PDF
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_edgeR_volcano_plots.pdf", 
       plot = gridExtra::marrangeGrob(plots_cluster2, nrow = 1, ncol = 1), 
       width = 8.5, height = 11, device = "pdf")



















# Define volcano function for EdgeR results with 22q11 gene highlighting
volcano <- function(df, lfc = "logFC", p = "PValue", gene = "gene", fdr_cut = 0.05, lfc_cut = 0.25, title = "") {
  # Define 22q11 genes
  x22q11_genes <- c("Ranbp1", "Dgcr8", "Cdc45", "Trmt2a", "Comt", "Tango2", "Mrpl40", 
                    "Slc25a1", "Zdhhc8", "Txnrd2", "Hira", "Prodh")
  
  # Calculate p-value cutoff that matches the FDR threshold
  p_cut <- calculate_pvalue_cutoff(df, p = p, fdr = "FDR", fdr_cut = fdr_cut)
  
  # Create significance and 22q11 annotation
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      signif = case_when(
        FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut & gene %in% x22q11_genes ~ "22q11_sig",
        FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "sig",
        TRUE ~ "ns"
      ),
      # Create a label column for 22q11 genes
      label = ifelse(gene %in% x22q11_genes & signif != "ns", gene, "")
    )
  
  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[lfc]], y = -log10(.data[[p]]), color = signif)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_cut, lfc_cut), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    # Add labels for 22q11 genes
    geom_text_repel(
      aes(label = label),
      size = 3,
      color = "darkgreen",
      fontface = "bold",
      max.overlaps = 20,
      box.padding = 0.5,
      segment.color = "darkgreen",
      segment.size = 0.5
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "22q11_sig" = "darkgreen",  # 22q11 genes that are significant
        "sig" = "red3",             # Other significant genes
        "ns" = "grey70"             # Not significant
      ),
      labels = c("22q11 Significant", "Other Significant", "Not significant")
    ) +
    labs(title = title, x = "log2 fold-change", y = "-log10(p)") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank()
    )
  
  # Only add the horizontal line if a valid p_cut was found
  if (!is.na(p_cut) && is.finite(p_cut)) {
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_cut), linetype = 2, color = "gray50")
  } else {
    warning("Could not calculate p-value cutoff for FDR = ", fdr_cut, 
            ". No horizontal line drawn.")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# Alternative version with different styling for 22q11 genes
volcano_22q11_highlight <- function(df, lfc = "logFC", p = "PValue", gene = "gene", 
                                   fdr_cut = 0.05, lfc_cut = 0.25, title = "") {
  # Define 22q11 genes
  x22q11_genes <- c("Ranbp1", "Dgcr8", "Cdc45", "Trmt2a", "Comt", "Tango2", "Mrpl40", 
                    "Slc25a1", "Zdhhc8", "Txnrd2", "Hira", "Prodh")
  
  # Calculate p-value cutoff that matches the FDR threshold
  p_cut <- calculate_pvalue_cutoff(df, p = p, fdr = "FDR", fdr_cut = fdr_cut)
  
  # Create significance categories
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      category = case_when(
        FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut & gene %in% x22q11_genes ~ "22q11 Significant",
        FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "Other Significant",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      ),
      # Create a label column for 22q11 genes
      label = ifelse(gene %in% x22q11_genes & category != "Not significant", gene, "")
    )
  
  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[lfc]], y = -log10(.data[[p]]), color = category, size = category)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_cut, lfc_cut), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    # Add labels for 22q11 genes
    geom_text_repel(
      aes(label = label),
      size = 3.5,
      color = "darkgreen",
      fontface = "bold",
      max.overlaps = 20,
      box.padding = 0.5,
      segment.color = "darkgreen",
      segment.size = 0.5,
      min.segment.length = 0
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "22q11 Significant" = "darkgreen",
        "Other Significant" = "red3",
        "Not significant" = "grey70"
      )
    ) +
    scale_size_manual(
      values = c(
        "22q11 Significant" = 2,
        "Other Significant" = 1.5,
        "Not significant" = 1
      )
    ) +
    labs(title = title, x = "log2 fold-change", y = "-log10(p-value)") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
    )
  
  # Only add the horizontal line if a valid p_cut was found
  if (!is.na(p_cut) && is.finite(p_cut)) {
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_cut), linetype = 2, color = "gray50")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# Create a list of plots with 22q11 highlighting
plots_cluster2 <- list(
  volcano_22q11_highlight(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: WT vs LD"),
  volcano_22q11_highlight(tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: WT vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_22q11_highlight(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: LD vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_22q11_highlight(tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: WT vs WT_NAC"),
  volcano_22q11_highlight(tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: WT_NAC vs LD_NAC")
)

# Save as multi-page PDF
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_edgeR_volcano_plots_22q11_highlighted.pdf", 
       plot = gridExtra::marrangeGrob(plots_cluster2, nrow = 1, ncol = 1), 
       width = 8.5, height = 11, device = "pdf")

# Also save individual plots for easier viewing
for (i in 1:length(plots_cluster2)) {
  comparison_name <- c("WT_vs_LD", "WT_vs_LD_NAC", "LD_vs_LD_NAC", "WT_vs_WT_NAC", "WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC")[i]
  ggsave(paste0("Cluster2_clean_edgeR_volcano_", comparison_name, "_22q11_highlighted.pdf"), 
         plots_cluster2[[i]], width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
}

# Print summary of 22q11 gene significance
print("22q11 Gene Significance Summary:")
for (i in 1:length(plots_cluster2)) {
  comparison_name <- c("WT_vs_LD", "WT_vs_LD_NAC", "LD_vs_LD_NAC", "WT_vs_WT_NAC", "WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC")[i]
  df_list <- list(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster2, tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, 
                  tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2, tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2)
  current_df <- df_list[[i]]
  
  sig_22q11 <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% x22q11_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  print(paste(comparison_name, ":", nrow(sig_22q11), "significant 22q11 genes"))
  if (nrow(sig_22q11) > 0) {
    print(sig_22q11 %>% select(gene, logFC, FDR))
  }
}
























# LD_NAC specific genes
LD_NAC_specific_genes <- c(
  "Wif1", "Npas4", "Rgs2", "Lgi2", "Slitrk6", "Nr4a2", "Rcan2", "Adcyap1", 
  "Nap1l5", "Omg", "Grm2", "Hdac9", "Osbpl3", "Spock3", "Aox1", 
  "Srxn1", "Sidt1", "Ngef", "Osgin1", "Hcn1", "Egr1"
)

# LD specific genes  
LD_specific_genes <- c(
  "Gucy1a2", "Vps13c", "Mirg", "Nyap2", "Pclo", "Lnpep", "Atm", "Proser1", 
  "B9d2"
)

# Print confirmation
print(paste("LD_NAC_specific_genes:", length(LD_NAC_specific_genes), "genes"))
print(paste("LD_specific_genes:", length(LD_specific_genes), "genes"))

# Define volcano function for EdgeR results with two gene set highlighting
volcano_two_sets <- function(df, lfc = "logFC", p = "PValue", gene = "gene", 
                            fdr_cut = 0.05, lfc_cut = 0.25, title = "") {
  
  # Calculate p-value cutoff that matches the FDR threshold
  p_cut <- calculate_pvalue_cutoff(df, p = p, fdr = "FDR", fdr_cut = fdr_cut)
  
  # Create gene set categories
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      gene_set = case_when(
        gene %in% LD_specific_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "LD Specific",
        gene %in% LD_NAC_specific_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "LD_NAC Specific",
        FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "Other Significant",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      ),
      # Create label column
      label = case_when(
        gene_set == "LD Specific" ~ gene,
        gene_set == "LD_NAC Specific" ~ gene,
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    )
  
  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[lfc]], y = -log10(.data[[p]]), color = gene_set, size = gene_set)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_cut, lfc_cut), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    # Add labels for both gene sets
    geom_text_repel(
      aes(label = label, color = gene_set),
      size = 3.2,
      fontface = "bold",
      max.overlaps = 30,
      box.padding = 0.6,
      segment.size = 0.5,
      min.segment.length = 0,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "LD Specific" = "darkcyan",
        "LD_NAC Specific" = "darkmagenta",
        "Other Significant" = "red3",
        "Not significant" = "grey70"
      )
    ) +
    scale_size_manual(
      values = c(
        "LD Specific" = 2,
        "LD_NAC Specific" = 2,
        "Other Significant" = 1.5,
        "Not significant" = 1
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title, 
      x = "log2 fold-change", 
      y = "-log10(p-value)"
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 9)
    ) +
    # Ensure symmetrical x-axis
    expand_limits(x = symmetric_limits(df[[lfc]]))
  
  # Only add the horizontal line if a valid p_cut was found
  if (!is.na(p_cut) && is.finite(p_cut)) {
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_cut), linetype = 2, color = "gray50")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# Create a list of plots with two gene set highlighting
plots_cluster2_two_sets <- list(
  volcano_two_sets(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: WT vs LD"),
  volcano_two_sets(tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: WT vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_two_sets(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: LD vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_two_sets(tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: WT vs WT_NAC"),
  volcano_two_sets(tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: WT_NAC vs LD_NAC")
)

# Save as multi-page PDF
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_edgeR_volcano_plots_two_sets.pdf", 
       plot = gridExtra::marrangeGrob(plots_cluster2_two_sets, nrow = 1, ncol = 1), 
       width = 9, height = 11, device = "pdf")

# Also save individual plots for easier viewing
for (i in 1:length(plots_cluster2_two_sets)) {
  comparison_name <- c("WT_vs_LD", "WT_vs_LD_NAC", "LD_vs_LD_NAC", "WT_vs_WT_NAC", "WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC")[i]
  ggsave(paste0("Cluster2_clean_edgeR_volcano_", comparison_name, "_two_sets.pdf"), 
         plots_cluster2_two_sets[[i]], width = 9, height = 7, dpi = 300)
}

# Print summary of gene set significance
print("Gene Set Significance Summary:")
comparison_names <- c("WT_vs_LD", "WT_vs_LD_NAC", "LD_vs_LD_NAC", "WT_vs_WT_NAC", "WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC")
df_list <- list(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster2, tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, 
                tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2, tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2)

for (i in 1:length(df_list)) {
  current_df <- df_list[[i]]
  
  sig_LD <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% LD_specific_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  sig_LD_NAC <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% LD_NAC_specific_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  print(paste("====", comparison_names[i], "===="))
  print(paste("LD specific genes:", nrow(sig_LD), "significant"))
  if (nrow(sig_LD) > 0) print(sig_LD %>% select(gene, logFC, FDR))
  
  print(paste("LD_NAC specific genes:", nrow(sig_LD_NAC), "significant"))
  if (nrow(sig_LD_NAC) > 0) print(sig_LD_NAC %>% select(gene, logFC, FDR))
  print("")
}


















# Define the two gene lists for mitochondrial/metabolism and 22q11
mitochondrial_metabolism_genes <- c(
  "Sesn2", "Ddit4", "Bhlhe40", "Mtor", "Tsc1", "Tsc2", "Uqcrc1", "Uqcrc2",
  "Foxo3", "Cat", "Sod1", "Sod2", "Sirt3", "Nfkb1", "Hif1a", "Gstp1",
  "Prdx1", "Prdx2", "Prdx5", "Hmox1", "Park7", "Psmb5", "Txnrd1", 
  "Slc38a1", "Nfe2l2"
)

x22q11_genes <- c("Ranbp1", "Dgcr8", "Cdc45", "Trmt2a", "Comt", "Tango2", "Mrpl40", 
                  "Slc25a1", "Zdhhc8", "Txnrd2", "Hira", "Prodh")

# Print confirmation
print(paste("Mitochondrial/Metabolism genes:", length(mitochondrial_metabolism_genes), "genes"))
print(paste("22q11 genes:", length(x22q11_genes), "genes"))

# Define volcano function for EdgeR results with mitochondrial/metabolism and 22q11 highlighting
volcano_mito_22q11 <- function(df, lfc = "logFC", p = "PValue", gene = "gene", 
                              fdr_cut = 0.05, lfc_cut = 0.25, title = "") {
  
  # Calculate p-value cutoff that matches the FDR threshold
  p_cut <- calculate_pvalue_cutoff(df, p = p, fdr = "FDR", fdr_cut = fdr_cut)
  
  # Create gene set categories
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      gene_set = case_when(
        gene %in% x22q11_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "22q11 Significant",
        gene %in% mitochondrial_metabolism_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "Mito/Metab Significant",
        FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "Other Significant",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      ),
      # Create label column
      label = case_when(
        gene_set == "22q11 Significant" ~ gene,
        gene_set == "Mito/Metab Significant" ~ gene,
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    )
  
  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[lfc]], y = -log10(.data[[p]]), color = gene_set, size = gene_set)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_cut, lfc_cut), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    # Add encircling for 22q11 genes
    geom_point(data = subset(df, gene_set == "22q11 Significant"), 
               shape = 1, size = 3, color = "darkgreen", stroke = 1.2) +
    # Add encircling for mitochondrial/metabolism genes
    geom_point(data = subset(df, gene_set == "Mito/Metab Significant"), 
               shape = 1, size = 3, color = "darkorange", stroke = 1.2) +
    # Add labels for both gene sets
    geom_text_repel(
      aes(label = label, color = gene_set),
      size = 3.2,
      fontface = "bold",
      max.overlaps = 30,
      box.padding = 0.6,
      segment.size = 0.5,
      min.segment.length = 0,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "22q11 Significant" = "darkgreen",
        "Mito/Metab Significant" = "darkorange",
        "Other Significant" = "red3",
        "Not significant" = "grey70"
      )
    ) +
    scale_size_manual(
      values = c(
        "22q11 Significant" = 2.5,
        "Mito/Metab Significant" = 2.5,
        "Other Significant" = 1.5,
        "Not significant" = 1
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title, 
      x = "log2 fold-change", 
      y = "-log10(p-value)"
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 9)
    ) +
    # Ensure symmetrical x-axis
    expand_limits(x = symmetric_limits(df[[lfc]]))
  
  # Only add the horizontal line if a valid p_cut was found
  if (!is.na(p_cut) && is.finite(p_cut)) {
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_cut), linetype = 2, color = "gray50")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# Create a list of plots with mitochondrial/metabolism and 22q11 highlighting
plots_cluster2_mito_22q11 <- list(
  volcano_mito_22q11(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: WT vs LD"),
  volcano_mito_22q11(tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: WT vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_mito_22q11(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: LD vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_mito_22q11(tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: WT vs WT_NAC"),
  volcano_mito_22q11(tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 2: WT_NAC vs LD_NAC")
)

# Save as multi-page PDF
ggsave("Cluster2_clean_edgeR_volcano_plots_mito_22q11.pdf", 
       plot = gridExtra::marrangeGrob(plots_cluster2_mito_22q11, nrow = 1, ncol = 1), 
       width = 9, height = 11, device = "pdf")

# Also save individual plots for easier viewing
for (i in 1:length(plots_cluster2_mito_22q11)) {
  comparison_name <- c("WT_vs_LD", "WT_vs_LD_NAC", "LD_vs_LD_NAC", "WT_vs_WT_NAC", "WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC")[i]
  ggsave(paste0("Cluster2_clean_edgeR_volcano_", comparison_name, "_mito_22q11.pdf"), 
         plots_cluster2_mito_22q11[[i]], width = 9, height = 7, dpi = 300)
}

# Print summary of gene set significance
print("Mitochondrial/Metabolism and 22q11 Gene Set Significance Summary:")
comparison_names <- c("WT_vs_LD", "WT_vs_LD_NAC", "LD_vs_LD_NAC", "WT_vs_WT_NAC", "WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC")
df_list <- list(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster2, tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, 
                tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2, tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2)

for (i in 1:length(df_list)) {
  current_df <- df_list[[i]]
  
  sig_22q11 <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% x22q11_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  sig_mito <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% mitochondrial_metabolism_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  print(paste("====", comparison_names[i], "===="))
  print(paste("22q11 genes:", nrow(sig_22q11), "significant"))
  if (nrow(sig_22q11) > 0) print(sig_22q11 %>% select(gene, logFC, FDR))
  
  print(paste("Mitochondrial/Metabolism genes:", nrow(sig_mito), "significant"))
  if (nrow(sig_mito) > 0) print(sig_mito %>% select(gene, logFC, FDR))
  print("")
}






```

```{r # 13. Heatmaps for Cluster 2 Cleaned}


pdf("Cluster2_clean_all_heatmaps_by_genotype.pdf", width = 10, height = 12)

gene_sets <- list(
  "Mitochondrial/metabolism" = c("Foxo3", "Cat", "Sod1", "Sod2", "Sirt3", "Nfkb1", "Hif1a", 
                                 "Gstp1", "Prdx1", "Prdx2", "Prdx5", "Hmox1", "Park7", 
                                 "Psmb5", "Txnrd1", "Slc38a1", "Nfe2l2", "Sesn2", "Ddit4",
                                 "Bhlhe40", "Mtor", "Tsc1", "Tsc2", "Uqcrc1", "Uqcrc2"),

  "LDvsLD-NAC specific" = c("Wif1", "Npas4", "Rgs2", "Lgi2", "Slitrk6", "Nr4a2", "Rcan2",
                            "Adcyap1", "Nap1l5", "Omg", "Grm2", "Hdac9", "Osbpl3", "Spock3",
                            "Aox1", "Srxn1", "Sidt1", "Ngef", "Osgin1", "Hcn1", "Egr1"),

  "WTvsLD specific" = c("Gucy1a2", "Vps13c", "Mirg", "Nyap2", "Pclo", "Lnpep", "Atm", "Proser1",
                        "B9d2"),
  "WTvsLD specific non-DE 50-100" = c("Dcc", "Nfat5", "Ccdc82", "Unc80", "Arfgef3", "Fzd3", "Klf12",
                        "Fkbp2", "Hes5", "Olig1", "Uqcc3", "Prr7", "Lmo1", "Zfp771",
                        "Nnat", "Zfyve16", "Klhl11", "Ccdc124"),
  "22q11 Genes" = c("Ranbp1", "Dgcr8", "Cdc45", "Trmt2a", "Comt", "Tango2", "Mrpl40",
                    "Slc25a1", "Zdhhc8", "Txnrd2", "Hira", "Prodh"),
    "11 NAC common Genes figure 4" = c("Grm2", "Wif1", "Lgi2", "Rgs2", "Srxn1", "Osgin1"),
    
    "14 NAC LD specific Genes figure 4" = c("Hcn1", "Aox1", "Hdac9", "Nap1l5", "Adcyap1", "Nr4a2")
)

genotype_order <- c("WT", "LD", "LD-NAC", "WT-NAC")

for (set_name in names(gene_sets)) {
  genes_found <- gene_sets[[set_name]][gene_sets[[set_name]] %in% rownames(cluster_2_clean)]
  if (length(genes_found) == 0) {
    cat("No genes found for", set_name, "\n")
    next
  }

  cat("Processing", set_name, "with", length(genes_found), "genes\n")

  avg_expression <- AverageExpression(
    cluster_2_clean,
    features = genes_found,
    group.by = "genotype",
    assays = names(Assays(cluster_2_clean))[1],
    slot = "data"
  )[[1]]

  # Convert sparse to dense matrix (important!)
  avg_expression <- as.matrix(avg_expression)

  # Match genotype order
  cols_to_use <- intersect(genotype_order, colnames(avg_expression))
  if (length(cols_to_use) == 0) next
  avg_expression <- avg_expression[, cols_to_use, drop = FALSE]

  # Scale and clean
  mat_scaled <- t(scale(t(avg_expression)))
  mat_scaled[is.na(mat_scaled)] <- 0
  col_fun <- colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2), c("navy", "white", "firebrick"))

  # Heatmap
  hm <- Heatmap(
    mat_scaled,
    name = "Z-score",
    cluster_rows = TRUE,
    cluster_columns = FALSE,
    col = col_fun,
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
    heatmap_legend_param = list(title = "Expression (z)"),
    column_title = paste("Cluster 2 -", set_name, "(", length(genes_found), "genes)"),
    show_row_names = TRUE
  )

  draw(hm)
  grid.newpage()
}

dev.off()
cat("✅ Saved: Cluster2_clean_all_heatmaps_by_genotype.pdf\n")

```

```{r heatmap test also works and quick way}

pdf("Cluster2_clean_all_heatmaps_by_genotype.pdf", width = 10, height = 12)

# correct genotype order (use hyphens)
genotype_order <- c("WT", "LD", "LD-NAC", "WT-NAC")

# loop over each gene set
for (i in seq_along(gene_sets)) {
  set_name <- names(gene_sets)[i]
  genes_found <- gene_sets[[i]][gene_sets[[i]] %in% rownames(cluster_2_clean)]
  
  if (length(genes_found) == 0) {
    cat("Skipping", set_name, "- no genes found\n")
    next
  }
  
  cat("Processing", set_name, "with", length(genes_found), "genes\n")
  
  avg_expression <- AverageExpression(
    cluster_2_clean,
    features = genes_found,
    group.by = "genotype",
    assays = names(Assays(cluster_2_clean))[1],
    slot = "data"
  )[[1]]
  
  # reorder genotype columns safely
  cols_to_use <- intersect(genotype_order, colnames(avg_expression))
  avg_expression <- avg_expression[, cols_to_use, drop = FALSE]
  
  # scale by gene (row-wise z-score)
  mat_scaled <- t(scale(t(avg_expression)))
  mat_scaled[is.na(mat_scaled)] <- 0
  
  col_fun <- colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2), c("navy", "white", "firebrick"))
  
  hm <- Heatmap(
    mat_scaled,
    name = "Z-score",
    cluster_rows = TRUE,
    cluster_columns = FALSE,
    col = col_fun,
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
    column_title = paste("Cluster 2 -", set_name, "(", length(genes_found), "genes)"),
    show_row_names = TRUE
  )
  
  draw(hm)
  if (i < length(gene_sets)) grid.newpage()
}

dev.off()
cat("✅ Saved: Cluster2_clean_all_heatmaps_by_genotype.pdf\n")

```


```{r gsea}
# Load required packages for pathway analysis
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)  # Mouse database (replace with org.Hs.eg.db for human)
library(enrichplot)
library(DOSE)
library(fgsea)
library(msigdbr)
library(pathview)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(patchwork)

# 1. PREPARE GENE LISTS FOR PATHWAY ANALYSIS

# Function to prepare ranked gene list for GSEA
prepare_gsea_rankings <- function(edgeR_df, method = "logFC") {
  # Remove rows with NA values
  edgeR_df <- edgeR_df[!is.na(edgeR_df$logFC) & !is.na(edgeR_df$FDR), ]
  
  if (method == "logFC") {
    # Rank by logFC (for GSEA)
    rankings <- edgeR_df$logFC
    names(rankings) <- edgeR_df$gene
  } else if (method == "signed_pval") {
    # Rank by signed p-value (-log10(FDR) * sign(logFC))
    rankings <- -log10(edgeR_df$FDR) * sign(edgeR_df$logFC)
    names(rankings) <- edgeR_df$gene
  }
  
  # Sort in decreasing order
  rankings <- sort(rankings, decreasing = TRUE)
  return(rankings)
}

# Prepare ranked lists for each comparison
ranked_LD_vs_WT <- prepare_gsea_rankings(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster2)
ranked_LDNAC_vs_WT <- prepare_gsea_rankings(tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2)
ranked_LDNAC_vs_LD <- prepare_gsea_rankings(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2)

# 2. LOAD GENE SETS

# Get MSigDB gene sets (Hallmark, C2:CP, C5:GO)
hallmark_sets <- msigdbr(species = "Mus musculus", category = "H")
kegg_sets <- msigdbr(species = "Mus musculus", category = "C2", subcategory = "CP")
go_bp_sets <- msigdbr(species = "Mus musculus", category = "C5", subcategory = "BP")
go_mf_sets <- msigdbr(species = "Mus musculus", category = "C5", subcategory = "MF")
go_cc_sets <- msigdbr(species = "Mus musculus", category = "C5", subcategory = "CC")

# Convert to list format for fgsea
hallmark_list <- split(hallmark_sets$gene_symbol, hallmark_sets$gs_name)
kegg_list <- split(kegg_sets$gene_symbol, kegg_sets$gs_name)
go_bp_list <- split(go_bp_sets$gene_symbol, go_bp_sets$gs_name)
go_mf_list <- split(go_mf_sets$gene_symbol, go_mf_sets$gs_name)
go_cc_list <- split(go_cc_sets$gene_symbol, go_cc_sets$gs_name)

# 3. RUN GSEA WITH FGSEA

run_gsea_analysis <- function(ranked_list, gene_sets, gene_set_name, comparison_name) {
  set.seed(123)
  
  # Check if ranked list is valid
  if (length(ranked_list) == 0) {
    warning(paste("Empty ranked list for", comparison_name, gene_set_name))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Check if gene sets are valid
  if (length(gene_sets) == 0) {
    warning(paste("Empty gene sets for", comparison_name, gene_set_name))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Run GSEA with error handling
  fgsea_res <- tryCatch({
    fgseaMultilevel(
      pathways = gene_sets,
      stats = ranked_list,
      minSize = 15,
      maxSize = 500,
      eps = 1e-50
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    message(paste("GSEA failed for", comparison_name, gene_set_name, ":", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  # Check if results are empty
  if (is.null(fgsea_res) || nrow(fgsea_res) == 0) {
    message(paste("No GSEA results for", comparison_name, gene_set_name))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Fix the nMoreExtreme column if it contains empty vectors
  if ("nMoreExtreme" %in% names(fgsea_res)) {
    fgsea_res$nMoreExtreme <- sapply(fgsea_res$nMoreExtreme, function(x) {
      if (length(x) == 0) {
        return(NA_real_)
      } else {
        return(as.numeric(x))
      }
    })
  }
  
  # Convert to regular data frame
  fgsea_res <- as.data.frame(fgsea_res)
  
  # Convert leadingEdge to character column
  fgsea_res$leadingEdge_genes <- sapply(fgsea_res$leadingEdge, function(x) {
    if(length(x) > 0) {
      paste(x, collapse = ";")
    } else {
      ""
    }
  })
  
  # Remove the original list column
  fgsea_res$leadingEdge <- NULL
  
  # Add comparison and gene set info
  fgsea_res$comparison <- comparison_name
  fgsea_res$gene_set <- gene_set_name
  
  # Order by NES and p-value
  fgsea_res <- fgsea_res[order(fgsea_res$padj, -abs(fgsea_res$NES)), ]
  
  return(fgsea_res)
}

# Run GSEA for all comparisons and gene sets
gsea_results <- list()

# LD vs WT
message("Running LD_vs_WT comparisons...")
gsea_results[["LD_vs_WT_hallmark"]] <- run_gsea_analysis(ranked_LD_vs_WT, hallmark_list, "Hallmark", "LD_vs_WT")
gsea_results[["LD_vs_WT_kegg"]] <- run_gsea_analysis(ranked_LD_vs_WT, kegg_list, "KEGG", "LD_vs_WT")
gsea_results[["LD_vs_WT_go_bp"]] <- run_gsea_analysis(ranked_LD_vs_WT, go_bp_list, "GO_BP", "LD_vs_WT")

# LD_NAC vs WT
message("Running LDNAC_vs_WT comparisons...")
gsea_results[["LDNAC_vs_WT_hallmark"]] <- run_gsea_analysis(ranked_LDNAC_vs_WT, hallmark_list, "Hallmark", "LDNAC_vs_WT")
gsea_results[["LDNAC_vs_WT_kegg"]] <- run_gsea_analysis(ranked_LDNAC_vs_WT, kegg_list, "KEGG", "LDNAC_vs_WT")
gsea_results[["LDNAC_vs_WT_go_bp"]] <- run_gsea_analysis(ranked_LDNAC_vs_WT, go_bp_list, "GO_BP", "LDNAC_vs_WT")

# LD_NAC vs LD
message("Running LDNAC_vs_LD comparisons...")
gsea_results[["LDNAC_vs_LD_hallmark"]] <- run_gsea_analysis(ranked_LDNAC_vs_LD, hallmark_list, "Hallmark", "LDNAC_vs_LD")
gsea_results[["LDNAC_vs_LD_kegg"]] <- run_gsea_analysis(ranked_LDNAC_vs_LD, kegg_list, "KEGG", "LDNAC_vs_LD")
gsea_results[["LDNAC_vs_LD_go_bp"]] <- run_gsea_analysis(ranked_LDNAC_vs_LD, go_bp_list, "GO_BP", "LDNAC_vs_LD")

# 4. COMBINE AND SAVE GSEA RESULTS

# Remove NULL results
gsea_results <- gsea_results[!sapply(gsea_results, is.null)]

# Check if we have any results
if(length(gsea_results) > 0) {
  
  # Combine all results
  all_gsea_results <- do.call(rbind, gsea_results)
  rownames(all_gsea_results) <- NULL
  
  # Ensure it's a proper data frame without list columns
  all_gsea_results <- as.data.frame(all_gsea_results)
  
  # Remove any remaining list columns
  list_columns <- sapply(all_gsea_results, is.list)
  if(any(list_columns)) {
    warning("Removing list columns: ", paste(names(all_gsea_results)[list_columns], collapse = ", "))
    all_gsea_results <- all_gsea_results[, !list_columns]
  }
  
  # Convert all columns to appropriate types
  all_gsea_results$pathway <- as.character(all_gsea_results$pathway)
  all_gsea_results$pval <- as.numeric(all_gsea_results$pval)
  all_gsea_results$padj <- as.numeric(all_gsea_results$padj)
  all_gsea_results$ES <- as.numeric(all_gsea_results$ES)
  all_gsea_results$NES <- as.numeric(all_gsea_results$NES)
  
  # Handle nMoreExtreme column carefully
  if("nMoreExtreme" %in% names(all_gsea_results)) {
    all_gsea_results$nMoreExtreme <- sapply(all_gsea_results$nMoreExtreme, function(x) {
      if(length(x) == 0 || is.null(x)) {
        return(NA_real_)
      } else {
        return(as.numeric(x))
      }
    })
  }
  
  all_gsea_results$size <- as.numeric(all_gsea_results$size)
  
  if("leadingEdge_genes" %in% names(all_gsea_results)) {
    all_gsea_results$leadingEdge_genes <- as.character(all_gsea_results$leadingEdge_genes)
  }
  
  all_gsea_results$comparison <- as.character(all_gsea_results$comparison)
  all_gsea_results$gene_set <- as.character(all_gsea_results$gene_set)
  
  # Save comprehensive results
  write.csv(all_gsea_results, "Cluster2_EdgeR_GSEA_All_Results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  
  # Filter significant results (FDR < 0.25 for GSEA)
  significant_gsea <- all_gsea_results[all_gsea_results$padj < 0.25 & !is.na(all_gsea_results$padj), ]
  write.csv(significant_gsea, "Cluster2_EdgeR_GSEA_Significant.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  
  print("GSEA completed successfully!")
  print(paste("Total pathways tested:", nrow(all_gsea_results)))
  print(paste("Significant pathways (FDR < 0.25):", nrow(significant_gsea)))
  
  # Print top pathways by comparison
  for(comp in unique(all_gsea_results$comparison)) {
    comp_results <- all_gsea_results[all_gsea_results$comparison == comp & all_gsea_results$padj < 0.25 & !is.na(all_gsea_results$padj), ]
    if(nrow(comp_results) > 0) {
      print(paste("Top pathways for", comp, ":"))
      top_pathways <- head(comp_results[order(comp_results$padj), c("pathway", "NES", "padj")], 5)
      print(top_pathways)
    }
  }
  
  # 5. CREATE VISUALIZATIONS
  
  # Enhanced visualization function
  create_gsea_visualizations <- function(all_results, sig_results) {
    
    # Convert to data frame to ensure proper handling
    all_results <- as.data.frame(all_results)
    sig_results <- as.data.frame(sig_results)
    
    # Remove any list columns from visualization data
    list_cols_all <- sapply(all_results, is.list)
    if(any(list_cols_all)) {
      all_results <- all_results[, !list_cols_all]
    }
    
    list_cols_sig <- sapply(sig_results, is.list)
    if(any(list_cols_sig)) {
      sig_results <- sig_results[, !list_cols_sig]
    }
    
    # 1. Dot plot of top pathways across comparisons
    create_dot_plot <- function(sig_data, n_pathways = 15) {
      # Ensure we have the required columns and data
      if(nrow(sig_data) == 0) {
        message("No significant data for dot plot")
        return(ggplot() + theme_void() + labs(title = "No significant pathways for dot plot"))
      }
      
      required_cols <- c("pathway", "comparison", "padj", "NES")
      missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(sig_data))
      if(length(missing_cols) > 0) {
        message("Missing required columns for dot plot: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
        return(ggplot() + theme_void() + labs(title = "Missing columns for dot plot"))
      }
      
      # Get the top pathways by absolute NES across all comparisons
      top_pathways <- sig_data %>%
        group_by(pathway) %>%
        summarise(max_abs_NES = max(abs(NES))) %>%
        arrange(desc(max_abs_NES)) %>%
        head(n_pathways) %>%
        pull(pathway)
      
      plot_data <- sig_data[sig_data$pathway %in% top_pathways, ]
      
      ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = comparison, y = pathway)) +
        geom_point(aes(size = -log10(padj), color = NES)) +
        scale_color_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", 
                             midpoint = 0, name = "NES") +
        scale_size_continuous(name = "-Log10(FDR)", range = c(2, 8)) +
        labs(title = "Top Enriched Pathways Across Comparisons",
             subtitle = "Bubble size: -log10(FDR), Color: NES",
             x = "Comparison", y = "Pathway") +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
              axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))
    }
    
    # 2. NES comparison bar plot
    create_nes_barplot <- function(sig_data, top_n = 10) {
      # Ensure we have the required columns and data
      if(nrow(sig_data) == 0) {
        message("No significant data for bar plot")
        return(ggplot() + theme_void() + labs(title = "No significant pathways for bar plot"))
      }
      
      required_cols <- c("pathway", "comparison", "NES")
      missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(sig_data))
      if(length(missing_cols) > 0) {
        message("Missing required columns for bar plot: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
        return(ggplot() + theme_void() + labs(title = "Missing columns for bar plot"))
      }
      
      # Get top pathways for each comparison
      top_by_comparison <- sig_data %>%
        group_by(comparison) %>%
        slice_max(order_by = abs(NES), n = top_n) %>%
        ungroup()
      
      ggplot(top_by_comparison, aes(x = NES, y = reorder(pathway, NES), fill = NES)) +
        geom_col() +
        scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", 
                            midpoint = 0, name = "NES") +
        labs(title = "Top Pathways by Normalized Enrichment Score",
             x = "NES", y = "") +
        facet_wrap(~comparison, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7))
    }
    
    # Create all visualizations
    pdf("Cluster2_GSEA_Comprehensive_Visualizations.pdf", width = 12, height = 10)
    
    if(nrow(sig_results) > 0) {
      tryCatch({
        # Dot plot
        p1 <- create_dot_plot(sig_results)
        print(p1)
      }, error = function(e) {
        message("Error creating dot plot: ", e$message)
        p_message <- ggplot() + 
          annotate("text", x = 1, y = 1, label = paste("Error in dot plot:", e$message), size = 4) +
          theme_void()
        print(p_message)
      })
      
      tryCatch({
        # NES bar plot
        p2 <- create_nes_barplot(sig_results, 8)
        print(p2)
      }, error = function(e) {
        message("Error creating bar plot: ", e$message)
        p_message <- ggplot() + 
          annotate("text", x = 1, y = 1, label = paste("Error in bar plot:", e$message), size = 4) +
          theme_void()
        print(p_message)
      })
      
    } else {
      # If no significant results, create a message plot
      p_message <- ggplot() + 
        annotate("text", x = 1, y = 1, label = "No significant pathways found (FDR < 0.25)", size = 6) +
        theme_void()
      print(p_message)
    }
    
    dev.off()
    
    # Create individual comparison plots
    pdf("Cluster2_GSEA_By_Comparison.pdf", width = 10, height = 8)
    
    for(comp in unique(all_results$comparison)) {
      comp_data <- all_results[all_results$comparison == comp, ]
      comp_sig <- comp_data[comp_data$padj < 0.25 & !is.na(comp_data$padj), ]
      
      if(nrow(comp_sig) > 0) {
        tryCatch({
          # Create dot plot for this comparison
          p_comp <- ggplot(comp_sig, aes(x = NES, y = reorder(pathway, NES))) +
            geom_point(aes(size = -log10(padj), color = NES)) +
            scale_color_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", 
                                 midpoint = 0, name = "NES") +
            scale_size_continuous(name = "-Log10(FDR)", range = c(2, 6)) +
            labs(title = paste("GSEA Results:", comp),
                 x = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)",
                 y = "") +
            theme_minimal() +
            theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))
          
          print(p_comp)
        }, error = function(e) {
          message("Error creating plot for ", comp, ": ", e$message)
        })
      }
    }
    
    dev.off()
    
    print("✅ GSEA visualizations created and saved!")
  }
  
  # Create a summary report
  create_gsea_summary_report <- function(sig_results) {
    # Convert to data frame and remove list columns
    sig_results <- as.data.frame(sig_results)
    list_cols <- sapply(sig_results, is.list)
    if(any(list_cols)) {
      sig_results <- sig_results[, !list_cols]
    }
    
    if(nrow(sig_results) == 0) {
      report_text <- "No significant pathways found at FDR < 0.25"
      writeLines(report_text, "GSEA_Summary_Report.txt")
      return(report_text)
    }
    
    summary_text <- paste(
      "GSEA SUMMARY REPORT",
      "===================",
      paste("Total significant pathways:", nrow(sig_results)),
      "",
      "Breakdown by comparison:",
      sep = "\n"
    )
    
    for(comp in unique(sig_results$comparison)) {
      comp_count <- sum(sig_results$comparison == comp)
      up_count <- sum(sig_results$comparison == comp & sig_results$NES > 0)
```
