```{r gsea}
      down_count <- sum(sig_results$comparison == comp & sig_results$NES < 0)
      
      summary_text <- paste(
        summary_text,
        paste(comp, ":", comp_count, "pathways (", up_count, "up,", down_count, "down)"),
        sep = "\n"
      )
    }
    
    # Top pathways overall
    top_overall <- sig_results %>%
      arrange(padj) %>%
      head(10)
    
    pathway_summaries <- sapply(1:nrow(top_overall), function(i) {
      paste(top_overall$pathway[i], " (NES=", round(top_overall$NES[i], 2), ", FDR=", 
            formatC(top_overall$padj[i], format = "e", digits = 2), ")", sep = "")
    })
    
    summary_text <- paste(
      summary_text,
      "",
      "Top 10 most significant pathways:",
      paste(pathway_summaries, collapse = "\n"),
      sep = "\n"
    )
    
    # Write to file
    writeLines(summary_text, "GSEA_Summary_Report.txt")
    
    return(summary_text)
  }
  
  # Now run the visualizations and summary report
  create_gsea_visualizations(all_gsea_results, significant_gsea)
  
  # Generate summary report
  report <- create_gsea_summary_report(significant_gsea)
  print(report)
  
} else {
  print("No GSEA results were generated. Please check the input data and pathway databases.")
}

print("🎉 GSEA analysis complete! Check the generated files:")
print("- Cluster2_EdgeR_GSEA_All_Results.csv (all pathways)")
print("- Cluster2_EdgeR_GSEA_Significant.csv (significant pathways only)")
print("- Cluster2_GSEA_Comprehensive_Visualizations.pdf (all plots)")
print("- Cluster2_GSEA_By_Comparison.pdf (individual comparison plots)")
print("- GSEA_Summary_Report.txt (text summary)")c(
  "~/labs/lamantia/Shah/Xenium Files/saveRDS/Cluster2_clean/cluster2_edgeR_volcano_focused_three_genesets.pdf",
  "~/labs/lamantia/Shah/Xenium Files/saveRDS/Cluster2_clean/cluster2_edgeR_volcano_LD_vs_LD_NAC_focused_three_genesets.pdf",
  "~/labs/lamantia/Shah/Xenium Files/saveRDS/Cluster2_clean/cluster2_edgeR_volcano_LD_vs_LD_NAC_significant_only_three_genesets.pdf",
  "~/labs/lamantia/Shah/Xenium Files/saveRDS/Cluster2_clean/cluster2_edgeR_volcano_significant_only_three_genesets.pdf",
  "~/labs/lamantia/Shah/Xenium Files/saveRDS/Cluster2_clean/cluster2_edgeR_volcano_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_focused_three_genesets.pdf",
  "~/labs/lamantia/Shah/Xenium Files/saveRDS/Cluster2_clean/cluster2_edgeR_volcano_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_significant_only_three_genesets.pdf",
  "~/labs/lamantia/Shah/Xenium Files/saveRDS/Cluster2_clean/cluster2_edgeR_volcano_WT_vs_LD_focused_three_genesets.pdf",
  "~/labs/lamantia/Shah/Xenium Files/saveRDS/Cluster2_clean/cluster2_edgeR_volcano_WT_vs_LD_NAC_focused_three_genesets.pdf",
  "~/labs/lamantia/Shah/Xenium Files/saveRDS/Cluster2_clean/cluster2_edgeR_volcano_WT_vs_LD_NAC_significant_only_three_genesets.pdf",
  "~/labs/lamantia/Shah/Xenium Files/saveRDS/Cluster2_clean/cluster2_edgeR_volcano_WT_vs_LD_significant_only_three_genesets.pdf",
  "~/labs/lamantia/Shah/Xenium Files/saveRDS/Cluster2_clean/cluster2_edgeR_volcano_WT_vs_WT_NAC_focused_three_genesets.pdf",
  "~/labs/lamantia/Shah/Xenium Files/saveRDS/Cluster2_clean/cluster2_edgeR_volcano_WT_vs_WT_NAC_significant_only_three_genesets.pdf",
  "~/labs/lamantia/Shah/Xenium Files/saveRDS/Cluster2_clean/cluster2_gene_set_significance_summary.csv"
)

```


```{r volcano significant only gene with 3 labels}
# Load required packages
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)

# Define helper functions first
calculate_pvalue_cutoff <- function(df, p = "PValue", fdr = "FDR", fdr_cut = 0.05) {
  if (!fdr %in% colnames(df)) {
    warning("FDR column not found, using PValue column instead")
    # Find the p-value that corresponds to the desired FDR cutoff
    df_sorted <- df[order(df[[p]]), ]
    df_sorted$rank <- 1:nrow(df_sorted)
    df_sorted$fdr_estimated <- df_sorted[[p]] * nrow(df_sorted) / df_sorted$rank
    p_cut <- max(df_sorted[[p]][df_sorted$fdr_estimated <= fdr_cut], na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    # Find the p-value that corresponds to the desired FDR cutoff
    df_sorted <- df[order(df[[p]]), ]
    p_cut <- max(df_sorted[[p]][df_sorted[[fdr]] <= fdr_cut], na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  return(p_cut)
}

symmetric_limits <- function(x) {
  max_abs <- max(abs(x), na.rm = TRUE)
  c(-max_abs, max_abs)
}

# Define the three gene lists for mitochondrial/metabolism, 22q11, and in vitro DE genes
mitochondrial_metabolism_genes <- c( "Park7", "Prdx5","Ddit4", "Sirt3", 
  "Foxo3", "Nfe2l2", "Sesn2",  "Uqcrc1", "Bhlhe40", "Hmox1", "Nfkb1", "Mtor", "Tsc1", "Slc38a1", "Cat", "Prdx2", "Sod2",  "Psmb5","Gstp1", "Hif1a", "Prdx1", "Uqcrc2", "Sod1",
  "Txnrd1", "Tsc2"
)

in_vitro_de_genes <- c(
  "Wif1", "Npas4", "Rgs2", "Lgi2", "Slitrk6", "Nr4a2", "Rcan2", "Adcyap1", 
  "Nap1l5", "Omg", "Grm2", "Hdac9", "Osbpl3", "Spock3", "Aox1", 
  "Srxn1", "Sidt1", "Ngef", "Osgin1", "Hcn1", "Egr1", "Gucy1a2", "Vps13c", "Mirg", "Nyap2", "Pclo", "Lnpep", "Atm", "Proser1", 
  "B9d2"
)

x22q11_genes <- c("Ranbp1", "Dgcr8", "Cdc45", "Trmt2a", "Comt", "Tango2", "Mrpl40", 
                  "Slc25a1", "Zdhhc8", "Txnrd2", "Hira", "Prodh")

# Print confirmation
print(paste("Mitochondrial/Metabolism genes:", length(mitochondrial_metabolism_genes), "genes"))
print(paste("In vitro DE genes:", length(in_vitro_de_genes), "genes"))
print(paste("22q11 genes:", length(x22q11_genes), "genes"))

# Define volcano function for EdgeR results with all three gene sets highlighting
volcano_mito_22q11_invitro <- function(df, lfc = "logFC", p = "PValue", gene = "gene", 
                              fdr_cut = 0.05, lfc_cut = 0.25, title = "") {
  
  # Calculate p-value cutoff that matches the FDR threshold
  p_cut <- calculate_pvalue_cutoff(df, p = p, fdr = "FDR", fdr_cut = fdr_cut)
  
  # Create gene set categories
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      gene_set = case_when(
        gene %in% x22q11_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "22q11 Significant",
        gene %in% mitochondrial_metabolism_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "Mito/Metab Significant",
        gene %in% in_vitro_de_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "In vitro DE Significant",
        FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "Other Significant",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      ),
      # Create label column
      label = case_when(
        gene_set == "22q11 Significant" ~ gene,
        gene_set == "Mito/Metab Significant" ~ gene,
        gene_set == "In vitro DE Significant" ~ gene,
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    )
  
  # Filter to show only significant points for cleaner visualization
  df_sig <- df %>% filter(FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut)
  
  # Create the plot with only significant points
  p <- ggplot(df_sig, aes(x = .data[[lfc]], y = -log10(.data[[p]]), color = gene_set, size = gene_set)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_cut, lfc_cut), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    # Add encircling for 22q11 genes
    geom_point(data = subset(df_sig, gene_set == "22q11 Significant"), 
               shape = 1, size = 3, color = "darkgreen", stroke = 1.2) +
    # Add encircling for mitochondrial/metabolism genes
    geom_point(data = subset(df_sig, gene_set == "Mito/Metab Significant"), 
               shape = 1, size = 3, color = "darkorange", stroke = 1.2) +
    # Add encircling for in vitro DE genes
    geom_point(data = subset(df_sig, gene_set == "In vitro DE Significant"), 
               shape = 1, size = 3, color = "darkgrey", stroke = 1.2) +
    # Add labels for all three gene sets
    geom_text_repel(
      aes(label = label, color = gene_set),
      size = 3.2,
      fontface = "bold",
      max.overlaps = 50,
      box.padding = 0.6,
      segment.size = 0.5,
      min.segment.length = 0,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "22q11 Significant" = "darkgreen",
        "Mito/Metab Significant" = "darkorange",
        "In vitro DE Significant" = "darkgrey",
        "Other Significant" = "red3"
      )
    ) +
    scale_size_manual(
      values = c(
        "22q11 Significant" = 2.5,
        "Mito/Metab Significant" = 2.5,
        "In vitro DE Significant" = 2.5,
        "Other Significant" = 1.5
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title, 
      x = "log2 fold-change", 
      y = "-log10(p-value)"
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 9)
    ) +
    # Ensure symmetrical x-axis
    expand_limits(x = symmetric_limits(df_sig[[lfc]]))
  
  # Only add the horizontal line if a valid p_cut was found
  if (!is.na(p_cut) && is.finite(p_cut)) {
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_cut), linetype = 2, color = "gray50")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# Alternative version that shows ALL points but focuses on significant region
volcano_mito_22q11_invitro_focused <- function(df, lfc = "logFC", p = "PValue", gene = "gene", 
                                      fdr_cut = 0.05, lfc_cut = 0.25, title = "") {
  
  # Calculate p-value cutoff that matches the FDR threshold
  p_cut <- calculate_pvalue_cutoff(df, p = p, fdr = "FDR", fdr_cut = fdr_cut)
  
  # Create gene set categories
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      gene_set = case_when(
        gene %in% x22q11_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "22q11 Significant",
        gene %in% mitochondrial_metabolism_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "Mito/Metab Significant",
        gene %in% in_vitro_de_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "In vitro DE Significant",
        FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "Other Significant",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      ),
      # Create label column
      label = case_when(
        gene_set == "22q11 Significant" ~ gene,
        gene_set == "Mito/Metab Significant" ~ gene,
        gene_set == "In vitro DE Significant" ~ gene,
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    )
  
  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[lfc]], y = -log10(.data[[p]]), color = gene_set, size = gene_set)) +
    # Plot non-significant points in light grey and smaller
    geom_point(data = subset(df, gene_set == "Not significant"), 
               alpha = 0.3, color = "grey80", size = 0.8) +
    # Plot significant points
    geom_point(data = subset(df, gene_set != "Not significant"), alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_cut, lfc_cut), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    # Add encircling for 22q11 genes
    geom_point(data = subset(df, gene_set == "22q11 Significant"), 
               shape = 1, size = 3, color = "darkgreen", stroke = 1.2) +
    # Add encircling for mitochondrial/metabolism genes
    geom_point(data = subset(df, gene_set == "Mito/Metab Significant"), 
               shape = 1, size = 3, color = "darkorange", stroke = 1.2) +
    # Add encircling for in vitro DE genes
    geom_point(data = subset(df, gene_set == "In vitro DE Significant"), 
               shape = 1, size = 3, color = "darkgrey", stroke = 1.2) +
    # Add labels for all three gene sets
    geom_text_repel(
      aes(label = label, color = gene_set),
      size = 3.2,
      fontface = "bold",
      max.overlaps = 50,
      box.padding = 0.6,
      segment.size = 0.5,
      min.segment.length = 0,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "22q11 Significant" = "darkgreen",
        "Mito/Metab Significant" = "darkorange",
        "In vitro DE Significant" = "darkgrey",
        "Other Significant" = "red3",
        "Not significant" = "grey80"
      )
    ) +
    scale_size_manual(
      values = c(
        "22q11 Significant" = 2.5,
        "Mito/Metab Significant" = 2.5,
        "In vitro DE Significant" = 2.5,
        "Other Significant" = 1.5,
        "Not significant" = 0.8
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title, 
      x = "log2 fold-change", 
      y = "-log10(p-value)"
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 9)
    ) +
    # Ensure symmetrical x-axis
    expand_limits(x = symmetric_limits(df[[lfc]])) +
    # Focus on significant region by setting y-axis limits
    ylim(-log10(p_cut) * 0.8, max(-log10(df[[p]][is.finite(-log10(df[[p]]))]), na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05)
  
  # Only add the horizontal line if a valid p_cut was found
  if (!is.na(p_cut) && is.finite(p_cut)) {
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_cut), linetype = 2, color = "gray50")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# Create a list of plots with all three gene sets highlighting (significance-only version)
plots_cluster2_all_genesets_sig <- list(
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster2, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs LD"),
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro(tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 0: LD vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro(tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs WT_NAC"),
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro(tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 0: WT_NAC vs LD_NAC")
)

# Create a list of plots with all three gene sets highlighting (focused version)
plots_cluster2_all_genesets_focused <- list(
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro_focused(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster2, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs LD"),
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro_focused(tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro_focused(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 0: LD vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro_focused(tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs WT_NAC"),
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro_focused(tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, title = "Cluster 0: WT_NAC vs LD_NAC")
)

# Save both versions as multi-page PDFs
ggsave("cluster2_edgeR_volcano_significant_only_three_genesets.pdf", 
       plot = gridExtra::marrangeGrob(plots_cluster2_all_genesets_sig, nrow = 1, ncol = 1), 
       width = 9, height = 11, device = "pdf")

ggsave("cluster2_edgeR_volcano_focused_three_genesets.pdf", 
       plot = gridExtra::marrangeGrob(plots_cluster2_all_genesets_focused, nrow = 1, ncol = 1), 
       width = 9, height = 11, device = "pdf")

# Also save individual plots for easier viewing
comparison_names <- c("WT_vs_LD", "WT_vs_LD_NAC", "LD_vs_LD_NAC", "WT_vs_WT_NAC", "WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC")

for (i in 1:length(plots_cluster2_all_genesets_sig)) {
  ggsave(paste0("cluster2_edgeR_volcano_", comparison_names[i], "_significant_only_three_genesets.pdf"), 
         plots_cluster2_all_genesets_sig[[i]], width = 9, height = 7, dpi = 300)
}

for (i in 1:length(plots_cluster2_all_genesets_focused)) {
  ggsave(paste0("cluster2_edgeR_volcano_", comparison_names[i], "_focused_three_genesets.pdf"), 
         plots_cluster2_all_genesets_focused[[i]], width = 9, height = 7, dpi = 300)
}

# Print summary of gene set significance for all three gene sets
print("Mitochondrial/Metabolism, In vitro DE, and 22q11 Gene Set Significance Summary:")
comparison_names <- c("WT_vs_LD", "WT_vs_LD_NAC", "LD_vs_LD_NAC", "WT_vs_WT_NAC", "WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC")
df_list <- list(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster2, tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2, 
                tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster2, tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster2)

for (i in 1:length(df_list)) {
  current_df <- df_list[[i]]
  
  sig_22q11 <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% x22q11_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  sig_mito <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% mitochondrial_metabolism_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  sig_invitro <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% in_vitro_de_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  print(paste("====", comparison_names[i], "===="))
  print(paste("22q11 genes:", nrow(sig_22q11), "significant"))
  if (nrow(sig_22q11) > 0) {
    # Use base R subsetting instead of dplyr::select
    print(sig_22q11[, c("gene", "logFC", "FDR")])
  }
  
  print(paste("Mitochondrial/Metabolism genes:", nrow(sig_mito), "significant"))
  if (nrow(sig_mito) > 0) {
    print(sig_mito[, c("gene", "logFC", "FDR")])
  }
  
  print(paste("In vitro DE genes:", nrow(sig_invitro), "significant"))
  if (nrow(sig_invitro) > 0) {
    print(sig_invitro[, c("gene", "logFC", "FDR")])
  }
  print("")
}

# Create a comprehensive summary table
summary_table <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(df_list)) {
  current_df <- df_list[[i]]
  
  sig_22q11 <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% x22q11_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  sig_mito <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% mitochondrial_metabolism_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  sig_invitro <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% in_vitro_de_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  comp_summary <- data.frame(
    Comparison = comparison_names[i],
    Total_22q11_genes = length(x22q11_genes),
    Significant_22q11 = nrow(sig_22q11),
    Total_Mito_Metab_genes = length(mitochondrial_metabolism_genes),
    Significant_Mito_Metab = nrow(sig_mito),
    Total_InVitro_DE_genes = length(in_vitro_de_genes),
    Significant_InVitro_DE = nrow(sig_invitro)
  )
  
  summary_table <- rbind(summary_table, comp_summary)
}

print("Comprehensive Summary Table:")
print(summary_table)
write.csv(summary_table, "cluster2_gene_set_significance_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}

# Create a new metadata column to identify Cluster 2 cells
all_samples$cluster_2_status <- ifelse(Cells(all_samples) %in% Cells(cluster_2_clean), 
                                      "Cluster_2", "Other")

# PCA with Cluster 2 highlighted
p_pca <- DimPlot(all_samples,
                 reduction = "pca",
                 group.by = "cluster_2_status",
                 cols = c("Cluster_2" = "#FF7F00", "Other" = "gray90"),
                 pt.size = 0.5,
                 order = "Cluster_2") +  # Plot Cluster 2 on top
  ggtitle("Cluster 2 Cells in PCA Space") +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_pca)




# Get variance explained by each PC
pca_variance <- all_samples@reductions$pca@stdev^2
pca_variance <- pca_variance / sum(pca_variance) * 100

p_pca <- DimPlot(all_samples,
                 reduction = "pca",
                 group.by = "cluster_2_status",
                 cols = c("Cluster_2" = "#FF7F00", "Other" = "gray90"),
                 pt.size = 0.5,
                 order = "Cluster_2") +
  ggtitle("Cluster 2 Cells in PCA Space") +
  xlab(paste0("PC1 (", round(pca_variance[1], 2), "%)")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2 (", round(pca_variance[2], 2), "%)")) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_pca)




library(patchwork)
library(ggplot2)

# Plot 1: Your original PCA
p1 <- DimPlot(all_samples,
              reduction = "pca",
              group.by = "cluster_2_status",
              cols = c("Cluster_2" = "#FF7F00", "Other" = "gray90"),
              pt.size = 0.3,
              order = "Cluster_2") +
  ggtitle("Cluster 2 in PCA Space") +
  theme_minimal()

# Plot 2: PC loadings (most influential genes)
# Get top genes contributing to PC1 and PC2
pc_loadings <- all_samples@reductions$pca@feature.loadings
top_pc1_genes <- head(rownames(pc_loadings[order(abs(pc_loadings[,1]), decreasing = TRUE),]), 10)
top_pc2_genes <- head(rownames(pc_loadings[order(abs(pc_loadings[,2]), decreasing = TRUE),]), 10)

# Create a loadings plot data frame
loadings_df <- data.frame(
  gene = c(top_pc1_genes, top_pc2_genes),
  pc = c(rep("PC1", 10), rep("PC2", 10)),
  loading = c(pc_loadings[top_pc1_genes, 1], pc_loadings[top_pc2_genes, 2])
)

p2 <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = loading, y = reorder(gene, abs(loading)), fill = pc)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~pc, scales = "free") +
  labs(x = "Loading", y = "Gene", title = "Top Genes Driving PC1 and PC2") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# Combine plots
combined <- p1 + p2 + plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1.5))
print(combined)



library(patchwork)

# Before cleaning (if you have the original cluster 2 with endothelial cells)
# If not, use the current plot but emphasize the endothelial gene story

p_pca <- DimPlot(all_samples,
                 reduction = "pca",
                 group.by = "cluster_2_status",
                 cols = c("Cluster_2" = "#FF7F00", "Other" = "gray90"),
                 pt.size = 0.5,
                 order = "Cluster_2") +
  ggtitle("Cluster Separation After Endothelial Cell Removal") +
  xlab("PC1 (Driven by Endothelial Genes)") +
  ylab("PC2 (Driven by Endothelial Genes)") +
  theme_minimal()

# Add a text annotation about the finding
p_pca <- p_pca + 
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, 
           label = "PC1/PC2 loadings dominated by endothelial genes\n(VWF, PECAM1, CDH5, etc.)",
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, size = 3.5,
           color = "red", fontface = "italic")

print(p_pca)




library(patchwork)

# Panel A: PCA showing separation
pca_panel <- p_pca +
  labs(subtitle = "Clear separation after endothelial cell removal")

# Panel B: Endothelial gene loadings
loadings <- all_samples@reductions$pca@feature.loadings
top_endo_genes <- head(rownames(loadings[order(abs(loadings[,1]), decreasing = TRUE),]), 8)

loadings_df <- data.frame(
  gene = top_endo_genes,
  pc1_loading = loadings[top_endo_genes, 1],
  pc2_loading = loadings[top_endo_genes, 2]
)

p_loadings <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = pc1_loading, y = pc2_loading)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "red") +
  geom_text(aes(label = gene), hjust = -0.1, vjust = 0.5, size = 3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
  ggtitle("Endothelial Genes Driving PC1/PC2") +
  xlab("PC1 Loadings") + ylab("PC2 Loadings") +
  theme_minimal()

# Panel C: Validation of low endothelial expression in cleaned cluster
p_vln <- VlnPlot(all_samples, 
                 features = endothelial_markers[1:2],
                 group.by = "cluster_2_status",
                 cols = c("Cluster_2" = "#FF7F00", "Other" = "gray70"),
                 pt.size = 0) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0))

# Arrange final figure
final_figure <- (pca_panel | p_loadings) / p_vln +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'A') +
  plot_layout(heights = c(2, 1))

print(final_figure)
```
